synopsis: ★ 勇奪「南韓奧斯卡」大鐘獎最佳影片、導演、劇本、女配角、新人等五項大獎 ★ 榮膺第4屆釜山影展開幕影片 ★ 第53屆法國坎城影展「導演雙週」入選影片 在千禧年前夕，金英浩依約到了年少時同伴們的河邊聚會，他們曾在這裡各自訴說夢想，也是金英浩與暗戀已久的初戀情人尹順林擁有最美好回憶的地方。但景物依舊，金英浩卻完全變了一個人，他在過往朋友們眾目睽睽下，站到了鐵軌上尋短，痛苦大喊：「我想回到過去！」。故事以他的死亡開始倒敘展開，五年前、十多年前、二十年前…曾經意氣風發的少年歷經風霜，命運的峰迴路轉讓他成了自己不想成為的人……。
synopsis_en:
Winner of five Grand Bell Awards (the "South Korean Oscars"), including Best Film, Director, Screenplay, Best Supporting Actress, and Best New Actor. Opening film of the 4th Busan International Film Festival and selected for the Directors' Fortnight at the 53rd Cannes Film Festival.

On the eve of the millennium, Kim Yong-ho arrives at a riverside reunion with his childhood friends. This is the spot where they once shared their dreams and where Kim experienced his most beautiful memories with his long-time first love, Yun Sun-im. But while the scenery remains the same, Kim is a changed man. Before the eyes of his old friends, he stands on the train tracks to end his life, screaming in agony: "I want to go back!" The story unfolds in reverse chronology starting from his death—moving back five years, ten years, and twenty years. A once high-spirited youth weathered by time, Kim is led by the cruel twists of fate to become the very person he never wanted to be.

On the eve of the millennium, Kim Yong-ho arrives at a riverside reunion with his childhood friends. This is the spot where they once shared their dreams and where Kim experienced his most beautiful memories with his long-time first love, Yun Sun-im. But while the scenery remains the same, Kim is a changed man. Before the eyes of his old friends, he stands on the train tracks to end his life, screaming in agony: "I want to go back!" The story unfolds in reverse chronology starting from his death—moving back five years, ten years, and twenty years. A once high-spirited youth weathered by time, Kim is led by the cruel twists of fate to become the very person he never wanted to be.

synopsis: ★ 勇奪「南韓奧斯卡」大鐘獎最佳影片、導演、劇本、女配角、新人等五項大獎 ★ 榮膺第4屆釜山影展開幕影片 ★ 第53屆法國坎城影展「導演雙週」入選影片 在千禧年前夕，金英浩依約到了年少時同伴們的河邊聚會，他們曾在這裡各自訴說夢想，也是金英浩與暗戀已久的初戀情人尹順林擁有最美好回憶的地方。但景物依舊，金英浩卻完全變了一個人，他在過往朋友們眾目睽睽下，站到了鐵軌上尋短，痛苦大喊：「我想回到過去！」。故事以他的死亡開始倒敘展開，五年前、十多年前、二十年前…曾經意氣風發的少年歷經風霜，命運的峰迴路轉讓他成了自己不想成為的人……。

synopsis: 66歲的美子與16歲的孫子相依為命。然而隨著年齡增長，她逐漸察覺記憶開始出現問題，被診斷出早期阿茲海默症。就在此時，一起震驚社區的少女死亡事件，也讓原本平靜的生活蒙上一層陰影。某天，美子在社區文化中心看到一張「詩歌課程」的海報，抱著好奇與期待報名參加。老師鼓勵學生重新觀察世界，從花朵、風景與日常細節中發現詩意。於是，美子開始用不同的眼光凝視身邊的一切。然而，在尋找詩句的過程中，美子也逐漸被迫面對現實與人性的複雜。當記憶逐漸流逝，她試圖在破碎的生活中寫下屬於自己的詩，也重新思考：在這個並不完美的世界裡，人究竟該如何守住善良與尊嚴呢?
tmdb_overview: Crude Poetry is a film about language. It is a film about a deep wish to be understood. Set in the ruins of biblical Babel, a long-lost city which housed speakers of a so called ‘universal language’, two characters come together to make meaning, in this stop motion, live puppetry hybrid.

Set in the ruins of biblical Babel, a long-lost city which housed speakers of a so called ‘universal language’, two characters come together to make meaning, in this stop motion, live puppetry hybrid.

Winner of five Grand Bell Awards (the "South Korean Oscars"), including Best Film, Director, Screenplay, Best Supporting Actress, and Best New Actor. Opening film of the 4th Busan International Film Festival and selected for the Directors' Fortnight at the 53rd Cannes Film Festival.

On the eve of the millennium, Kim Yong-ho arrives at a riverside reunion with his childhood friends. This is the spot where they once shared their dreams and where Kim experienced his most beautiful memories with his long-time first love, Yun Sun-im. But while the scenery remains the same, Kim is a changed man. Before the eyes of his old friends, he stands on the train tracks to end his life, screaming in agony: "I want to go back!" The story unfolds in reverse chronology starting from his death—moving back five years, ten years, and twenty years. A once high-spirited youth weathered by time, Kim is led by the cruel twists of fate to become the very person he never wanted to be.

synopsis: 66歲的美子與16歲的孫子相依為命。然而隨著年齡增長，她逐漸察覺記憶開始出現問題，被診斷出早期阿茲海默症。就在此時，一起震驚社區的少女死亡事件，也讓原本平靜的生活蒙上一層陰影。某天，美子在社區文化中心看到一張「詩歌課程」的海報，抱著好奇與期待報名參加。老師鼓勵學生重新觀察世界，從花朵、風景與日常細節中發現詩意。於是，美子開始用不同的眼光凝視身邊的一切。然而，在尋找詩句的過程中，美子也逐漸被迫面對現實與人性的複雜。當記憶逐漸流逝，她試圖在破碎的生活中寫下屬於自己的詩，也重新思考：在這個並不完美的世界裡，人究竟該如何守住善良與尊嚴呢?
tmdb_overview: Crude Poetry is a film about language. It is a film about a deep wish to be understood. Set in the ruins of biblical Babel, a long-lost city which housed speakers of a so called ‘universal language’, two characters come together to make meaning, in this stop motion, live puppetry hybrid.
tmdb_overview_en: Crude Poetry is a film about language. It is a film about a deep wish to be understood. Set in the ruins of biblical Babel, a long-lost city which housed speakers of a so called ‘universal language’, two characters come together to make meaning, in this stop motion, live puppetry hybrid.

synopsis: 改編自真實故事，14歲的摯友亞莉與莎拉，正面臨改變人生的難題，亞莉被診斷出罹患絕症，生命即將走到盡頭，而莎拉則被迫返回阿富汗，亞莉懷抱著真摯的情誼，寫信給荷蘭移民部長，願將自己的居留資格讓給莎拉：「我就要死了，可以讓她代替我留下嗎？」。這是一部動人心弦的電影，兩個青少年能真的改變這一切嗎？
source_language_note: 語言 荷蘭語 字幕 中文
synopsis_en: Based on a true story, 14-year-old best friends Ari and Sara are facing life-altering challenges. Ari has been diagnosed with a terminal illness and is nearing the end of her life, while Sara is being forced to return to Afghanistan. Driven by their deep bond, Ari writes a letter to the Dutch Minister for Migration, offering to give her own residency permit to Sara: "I am dying; can she stay in my place?" This is a heart-wrenching film—can two teenagers truly change the course of fate?

synopsis: 改編震撼人心的真實事件，好萊塢影星劉玉玲獻出從影至今的巔峰演技。一名重病纏身的母親，為了保護陷入黑暗執念且行為失控的叛逆兒子，不惜採取極端手段。在時間與壓力的雙重夾擊下，她被迫在絕境中面臨殘酷抉擇。背景設定於充滿壓抑氛圍的華裔社區，這是一部關於家庭被推向崩潰邊緣、母愛與犧牲交織的揪心力作。
source_language_note: 語言 英、國語 字幕 中文
tmdb_overview: 改編自震撼人心的真實事件，一名重病纏身的母親，為保護陷入黑暗執念且行為失控的叛逆兒子，不惜採取極端手段，在時間與壓力的雙重夾擊下，她被迫在絕境中面臨殘酷抉擇，背景設定於充滿壓抑氛圍的華裔社區，這是一部關於家庭被推向崩潰邊緣、母愛與犧牲交織的揪心力作，為了守護最愛，她究竟願意付出多少代價？
tmdb_overview_en: In a race against time, an ailing woman discovers her teenage son's violent obsessions and must go to great lengths to protect him, and possibly others, in this portrait of a Chinese American family. Inspired by true events.

synopsis: 夏洛特是一名過氣的電影明星，在她得知曾經一手將她捧紅的導演將在巴拉圭拍攝電影時，她二話不說租了一輛露營車驅車前往巴拉圭，期待能再次見到導演，爭取當他新片的女主角。只不過到了巴拉圭，她的期待變成了等待。更糟的是，她還因為一起事件而被國際刑警逮捕！夏洛特是否能夠如願見到導演，重返大銀幕呢？
source_language_note: 語言 西班牙語 字幕 中文
tmdb_overview: A forgotten movie star learns that the director who made her fa-mous will be filming his last film in Paraguay so she sets out on an unusual journey in search of something more than just getting the leading role that she feels belongs to her.
tmdb_overview_en: A forgotten movie star learns that the director who made her fa-mous will be filming his last film in Paraguay so she sets out on an unusual journey in search of something more than just getting the leading role that she feels belongs to her.

movie_title_en: In Search of a Mixed Identity
synopsis: 位在臺南中西區圓環，設有「湯德章紀念公園」，然而許多臺灣人、甚至臺南本地人都不知道湯德章是誰，引發在地的冰店老闆李文雄、女記者楊淑芬，開始追尋這位歷史人物，循序漸進地用輕鬆的方式層層抽絲剝繭湯德章的生平故事，並藉由湯德章人生中幾項重要選擇，以其為坐標，回望1907年至1947年的近代臺灣史。
source_language_note: 發音/字幕： 中文、台語、日語發音/中、英文字幕
tmdb_title: In Search of a Mixed Identity
tmdb_title_en: In Search of a Mixed Identity
tmdb_overview: 故事由一位台南冰店老闆發起，尋找湯德章的足跡，透過他的號召，一群熱愛熱愛台南地方文史者、記者展開探尋，找到湯德章的養子-湯聰模，湯聰模的回憶成為解開湯德章故事拼圖的關鍵。湯德章在殖民時期受到不公待遇，這激發了他對公平正義的追求，從事警察、律師等執法工作。然而，他的戲劇性一生卻在台灣政權交替的混亂時期，為了保護無辜的民眾，而受到不公平的迫害，年僅四十歲。本片由《灣生回家》導演黃銘正執導，以不同於一般歷史紀錄片的形式呈現。透過主要人物的尋找過程，將現實與歷史人物巧妙連結，兼具生活感、幽默趣味，並記錄了二二八遺族的感人一面。
tmdb_overview_en: The history of THNG Tek-chiong family not only reflects the confusion and the pursuit of Taiwanese identity over generations, but also serves as a cautionary tale for the people living in Taiwan.

country: 法國、以色列、賽普勒斯、德國
synopsis: 以巴衝突當下，國家滿目瘡痍，社會在傷痛與不安中前行，拮据度日的爵士樂手Y.與舞者妻子茉莉，為了生存，被迫將藝術、靈魂，甚至身體獻給上層權貴，不久後，Y.被賦予一項至高無上的任務，在國家期待與個人信念之間，他遊走於創作與妥協的邊界，直面藝術、責任與良知所必須付出的代價。
source_language_note: 語言 希伯來語 字幕 中文
tmdb_overview: 十月七日之後的以色列，國家滿目瘡痍，拮据度日的爵士樂手Y.與舞者妻子為了生存，被迫將藝術、靈魂，甚至身體獻給上層權貴，為受傷的社會提供短暫的慰藉，不久後Y.被賦予一項任務—為國家譜寫全新的國歌，在國家期待與個人信念之間，他遊走於創作與妥協的邊界，直面藝術、責任與良知所必須付出的代價。
tmdb_overview_en: In the days following October 7, Y., a jazz musician, and his wife Yasmin, a dancer, resolve to say yes to everything. Y. and Yasmin sell their bodies and souls to the highest bidder, surrendering themselves and their art to Israel’s social, political and military elite. Soon, Y. is entrusted with a mission of the utmost importance: to compose the music for a rousing, ruthless new national anthem.

synopsis: 阿遠初中畢業後，因家境不許，只好放棄學業到台北工作，那年他15歲，卻已認識阿雲14年。爾後阿雲也隨之北上，兩人生活雖苦但互相關照，那份不自覺的依戀，或許就是愛情。高中補校畢業後阿遠入伍，最掛念獨留台北的阿雲。然而，就在阿遠即將退伍之際，阿雲嫁給了別人。阿遠心痛極了，或許他一輩子都想不透阿雲為何離開，也永遠不會開口問，他寧願相信：像阿雲這樣的女孩，嫁的定是一個比我更好的人。
source_language_note: 發音/字幕： 台語、國語發音/中、英文字幕
tmdb_overview: 阿遠和阿雲從小是青梅竹馬，兩人來到台北一同生活。隨著阿遠即將入伍，他們約定每天都要書信往來。然而，阿雲卻愛上了每天送信的郵差，遠在金門的阿遠知道後，獨自在床舖上抱頭痛哭。一千多封寫好地址、姓名、貼好郵票卻寄不出的信，青春愛戀滿滿的苦澀，成長後更加深埋心中。
tmdb_overview_en: A-yuan and A-yun are both from the small mining town of Jio-fen. They move to Taipei, where A-yuan is an apprentice by day and goes to night school, and A-yun works as a helper at a tailors. Everyone thinks they are meant for each other, and so do they. They fail to see time and fate are beyond their control.

movie_title: 【嬰兒車電影院】勇敢樂章（國語）
synopsis: 瓦倫緹娜覺得唐氏症阻礙了她的夢想，雖然奶奶常說：「毛毛蟲都能變成蝴蝶，沒有什麼是不可能的！」就在她想問奶奶什麼是蛻變時，爸媽卻告訴她，奶奶出門旅行了，甚至連一句道別都沒有，為了找回奶奶，瓦倫緹娜帶著她的小老鼠夥伴奇奇，和棋盤上的搞怪朋友們，展開一場穿越音樂與回憶的奇幻旅程。
source_language_note: 語言 國語 字幕 中文
tmdb_overview: 瓦倫緹娜覺得唐氏症阻礙了她的夢想，雖然奶奶常說：「毛毛蟲都能變成蝴蝶，沒有什麼是不可能的！」就在她想問奶奶什麼是蛻變時，爸媽卻告訴她，奶奶出門旅行了，甚至連一句道別都沒有，為了找回奶奶，瓦倫緹娜帶著她的小老鼠夥伴奇奇，和棋盤上的搞怪朋友們，展開一場穿越音樂與回憶的奇幻旅程。
tmdb_overview_en: Valentina is fed up of her Down’s syndrome, convinced that it prevents her from making her dream true: becoming a trapeze artist. But a magical journey will reveal to her all that she is capable of doing.

synopsis: 「性愛夢三部曲」序曲。 如常午後，兩名煙囪工人聊著昨日各自的奇遇。一人出勤時，意外初嘗同性快感，但他自認不是同志，且又純屬衝動，便和妻子分享奇遇，而掀起婚姻危機；另一人睡夢中看見搖滾傳奇大衛・鮑伊望著自己，視線宛若凝視女人，一股陌生而享受的複雜感受升起，讓他分不清自己在夢中是男是女，也困惑著夢境的啟示。兩場奇遇，來自感官與內心的兩記震撼，重擊著中年直男們的不惑人生。
source_language_note: 發音/字幕： 挪威語/中、英文字幕
tmdb_overview: 如常午後，兩名煙囪工人聊著昨日各自的奇遇。一人出勤時，意外初嘗同性快感，但他自認不是同志，且又純屬衝動，便和妻子分享奇遇，而掀起婚姻危機；另一人睡夢中看見搖滾傳奇大衛鮑伊望著自己，視線宛若凝視女人，一股陌生而享受的複雜感受升起，讓他分不清自己在夢中是男是女，也困惑著夢境的啟示。兩場奇遇，來自感官與內心的兩記震撼，重擊著中年直男們的不惑人生。
tmdb_overview_en: Two married, heterosexual chimney sweeps face experiences that unsettle their views on sexuality and identity. One has a same-sex encounter without considering it either as an expression of homosexuality or infidelity. The other finds himself in dreams where he is seen as a woman.

synopsis: 1980年代末，想像力豐富的女孩風葵沉迷於催眠術與心靈感應的奧祕，癌症末期的爸爸、情緒不穩的媽媽、親密交心的友人，都是她的練習對象，隨著爸爸的病情加重，風葵反覆於自己構築的奇幻世界裡，琢磨生命與死亡、孤獨與渴望，只是再多的浮想聯翩，都無法改變那個長大後才能領悟的道理。
source_language_note: 語言 日文 字幕 中文
tmdb_overview: 1980年代末，想像力豐富的女孩風葵沉迷於催眠術與心靈感應的奧祕。癌症末期的爸爸、情緒不穩的媽媽、親密交心的友人，以及樓上的年輕寡婦，都是她的練習對象。隨著爸爸的病情加重，風葵反覆於自己構築的奇幻世界裡，琢磨生命與死亡、孤獨與渴望。只是再多的浮想聯翩，都無法改變那個長大後才能領悟的道理：人永遠無法真正理解另一個人。
tmdb_overview_en: In 1987 Tokyo, a quirky and sensitive 11-year-old girl copes with a terminally ill father and stressed-out working mother while encountering various adults dealing with their own struggles.

synopsis: 大律師林涼水以毒舌見稱，從法官轉為律師，第一個案件便是處理一宗全城關注的虐兒案時，一心想攀附權貴的他，大意讓被告人曾潔兒蒙受17年冤獄。自此身敗名裂，心懷愧疚，只好以廉價服務為平民百姓打官司，好撫平自己的內疚感。兩年過去，突然出現了可以讓曾潔兒案件翻案的新證據，他決定提出上訴。因案件涉及香港顯赫的鍾氏家族夫婦，加上鍾家法律顧問董大狀的下流招數，媒體、警界到司法界都與他為敵！在法庭內，林涼水面對強勢的主控官，全力以三寸不爛之舌與權貴展開大戰，誓要為被告人討回公道！
source_language_note: 語言 粵語 字幕 中文
tmdb_overview: 大律師林涼水以毒舌見稱，從法官轉為律師，第一個案件便是處理一宗全城關注的虐兒案時，一心想攀附權貴的他，大意讓被告人曾潔兒蒙受17年冤獄。自此身敗名裂，心懷愧疚，只好以廉價服務為平民百姓打官司，好撫平自己的內疚感。兩年過去，突然出現了可以讓曾潔兒案件翻案的新證據，他決定提出上訴。因案件涉及香港顯赫的鍾氏家族夫婦，加上鍾家法律顧問董大狀的下流招數，媒體、警界到司法界都與他為敵！在法庭內，林涼水面對強勢的主控官，全力以三寸不爛之舌與權貴展開大戰，誓要為被告人討回公道！
tmdb_overview_en: After his negligence causes an innocent woman to go to jail, a lawyer and his colleagues work to clear her name.

synopsis: 本片描述一個從未被提及的故事：隱藏在幕後的陰暗面：舊制度跟至高權力的崩塌，1792年，路易十六、瑪麗安東妮與他們的兩個孩子被捕，並且一家被囚禁於巴黎最陰森的聖殿塔內，等待審判，遠離凡爾賽宮的奢華，他們在過程中逐漸審視自己的脆弱，這輩子首次嘗到孤立無援的滋味。
source_language_note: 語言 法語 字幕 中文
tmdb_overview: 本片講述了一個從未被講述的故事：隱藏在幕後的陰暗面：地牢、暴力、痛苦，舊制度跟至高權力的崩塌，在1792 年，路易十六、瑪麗安東妮與他們的兩個孩子被捕，並且一家被囚禁於巴黎最陰森的聖殿塔內，等待審判，遠離凡爾賽宮的奢華，他們在過程中逐漸審視自己的脆弱，這輩子首次嘗到孤立無援的滋味。
tmdb_overview_en: 1792. Louis XVI, his wife Marie Antoinette, and their children have been arrested and imprisoned in the Tour du Temple, a sinister chateau in Paris, awaiting their trial. Far from the splendour of Versailles, they are isolated and vulnerable for the first time in their lives.

synopsis: 1958年冷戰高峰，在南斯拉夫核能研究所，教授帶領年輕科學家進行祕密實驗，遭受致命輻射傷害。他們被送往巴黎，接受實驗性治療。馬特醫生痛恨核武器，對科學家心存鄙視，科學家們也懷疑他的治療動機。在僅剩幾日壽命的危急時刻，馬特醫生提出進行史上首次人類骨髓移植，這是拿人命做實驗，還是真心要救人？
source_language_note: 語言 法、塞爾維亞語 字幕 中文
tmdb_overview: 1958年冷戰高峰，在南斯拉夫核能研究所，教授帶領年輕科學家進行秘密實驗，遭受致命輻射傷害。他們被送往巴黎，接受實驗性治療。馬特醫生痛恨核武器，對科學家心存鄙視，科學家們也懷疑他的治療動機。在僅剩幾日壽命的危急時刻，馬特醫生提出進行史上首次人類骨髓移植，這是拿人命做實驗，還是真心要救人？
tmdb_overview_en: In 1958, during the Cold War, two scientists, two worlds, and two ideologies faced a race for survival at the Vinca Scientific Institute near Belgrade.

synopsis: 改編自真實事件，1978年的阿富汗，正值社會主義轉型時期，一對形影不離的好朋友蘇拉雅和希瑪，蘇拉雅是出身富裕的共產主義者，而希瑪則是保守的穆斯林，即便是政治立場不同，卻完全不影響兩人的情誼，而在隨後蘇聯入侵以及反蘇聯勢力崛起的動盪中，兩個人經歷了人生和命運的巨變。
source_language_note: 語言 波斯、達里語 字幕 中文
tmdb_overview: 1978年的阿富汗，正值社會主義轉型時期，一對形影不離的好朋友蘇拉雅和希瑪，蘇拉雅是出身富裕的共產主義者，而希瑪則是保守的穆斯林，即便是政治立場不同，卻完全不影響兩人的情誼。而在隨後蘇聯入侵以及反蘇聯勢力崛起的動盪中，兩個人經歷了人生和命運的巨變。
tmdb_overview_en: With the Cold War about to break out in Afghanistan, young, lifelong friends Suraya and Sima must question their life choices and moral principles when they get involved in opposite sides of the conflict.

synopsis: 演員的姊姊從美國回來韓國和妹妹相聚，某天姊妹倆相約吃早餐跟在附近逛逛，到了中午姊姊則去赴了一個電影導演的約，兩人幾杯酒下肚以後，導演提出想為他量身打造合作一部電影的想法。姊姊起初回絕，並透露自己心底的祕密…。隔天姊姊醒來後收到導演簡訊，說明自己昨天的一切言論只是開玩笑，覺得可笑而不禁莞爾的姊姊，看著熟睡的妹妹，沉思是否要告訴她那最深處的秘密…。
source_language_note: 語言 韓語 字幕 中文
synopsis_en: An actress’s older sister returns to South Korea from the United States to reunite with her sibling. One morning, the two sisters meet for breakfast and a stroll. By noon, the older sister heads off to an appointment with a film director. After a few drinks, the director proposes collaborating on a film specifically tailored for her. She initially declines, revealing a secret she has been keeping close to her heart. The following morning, she wakes up to a text from the director claiming that everything he said the day before was merely a joke. Amused by the absurdity of it all, she looks at her sleeping sister and contemplates whether or not to share her deepest secret with her.

synopsis: 一部刻畫台灣攝影師許釗滂47年創作歷程的紀錄片。他以鏡頭行走山海，見證時代流轉，卻始終回望土地與自我。影像之中，不只是風景與人群，更是一份對家園的深沉情感與責任。在創作的孤獨與堅持裡，他持續追尋「尚未出現的那一張照片」，讓觀者重新思考觀看、記憶與存在的意義。
source_language_note: 語言 國語 字幕 中文
tmdb_overview: 年輕的母親法蘭琪患有罕見的時間感知障礙，她無法準確感受時間的流逝，生活因而混亂不堪，她每天依靠自製的錄音來引導自己的生活與行動，某日，一名神祕女子向她提出一份高酬但高風險的工作，為了照顧家庭維持生計，法蘭琪只能無奈接受，然而，她未曾料到，這個決定將引領她走向無法挽回的黑暗深淵。
tmdb_overview_en: Frankie, a young mother with dyschronometria, struggles to perceive time. Using cassette tapes for guidance, she takes a risky job from a mysterious woman to support her family, unaware of the dark consequences that await.

synopsis: 慧芳小學時看五燈獎手語歌引起學習動機，出社會後學習手語翻譯，成為正式的手語翻譯員。她曾是個幼兒園老師，如今他結合幼教教師和手語教師兩項專長，投入特殊兒童的手語教學，受到學生及家長的好評。回想讓她對於特殊兒童教學的熱忱，來自於小學老師的啟蒙，許下願望希望找到啟蒙老師表達感謝。
source_language_note: 語言 國語 字幕 中文
tmdb_overview: Sanne's and Markus' relationship is in crisis. They go on holiday together, but accidentally fly to the wrong island. There, in desperation, they break into an empty holiday home and embark on a role-play using new identities. At first, the game is an exciting rediscovery of their relationship, but it becomes increasingly destructive as they force themselves into archaic roles.
tmdb_overview_en: Sanne's and Markus' relationship is in crisis. They go on holiday together, but accidentally fly to the wrong island. There, in desperation, they break into an empty holiday home and embark on a role-play using new identities. At first, the game is an exciting rediscovery of their relationship, but it becomes increasingly destructive as they force themselves into archaic roles.

synopsis: 影片敘述，昀婕她從聽人到聽障的心路歷程，她用積極樂觀的態度，去面對生活中的不便及適應。在這理解及同理的過程中，我們似也走入了她的無聲世界，及看見她的聲音。
source_language_note: 語言 國語 字幕 中文
synopsis_en: The film chronicles Yun-jie’s journey from being a hearing person to becoming hearing impaired. With a positive and optimistic attitude, she navigates the challenges and adjustments of daily life. Through this process of understanding and empathy, we are invited into her silent world to truly "see" her voice.

synopsis: 藝術家的移居不僅僅是地理上的遷徙，更多層面是心境的重構。隨著孩子的誕生打亂既有生活節奏，促使創作步調重新編排；在日常的縫隙之中，新的感知悄然生成，延展出超乎預期的靈感軌跡。
source_language_note: 語言 國語 字幕 中文
synopsis_en: An artist’s relocation is more than a geographical move; it is a profound reconstruction of the inner landscape. As the arrival of a child disrupts the established rhythms of life, it prompts a reordering of the creative process. Within the quiet interstices of the everyday, new perceptions emerge, tracing unexpected trajectories of inspiration.

movie_title: 路上的貓背後的人 索
synopsis: 本片透過新竹市浪浪絕育協會志工的訪談，揭開那些穿梭在城市巷弄等貓、登貓的人類，在踏入這個圈子所遇到的奇形怪狀的事件，與那些辛酸血淚史。
source_language_note: 語言 國語 字幕 中文
synopsis_en: Through interviews with volunteers from the Hsinchu City Stray Animal Sterilization Association, this film sheds light on the people who navigate the city's narrow alleys to track and wait for stray cats. It explores the bizarre encounters and the stories of hardship, sweat, and tears they have faced since entering the world of animal rescue.

synopsis: 靜謐的嶺南蔗村，農婦陳鳳娣與丈夫甘耀祖正盼著新生命降臨。某日，她與孕婦林申同時在破舊的鄉村診所待產。一場突如其來的暴風雨沖垮圍籬，將兩個剛出生的女嬰捲入池塘，最終只有一個被救起。自此，鳳娣的女兒失蹤，她的世界也支離破碎。在流言、懷疑與偏見的包圍下，她不信命，獨自踏上尋女之路。然而，通往真相的路途，將迫使她面對一個個被埋藏的殘酷現實⋯⋯
source_language_note: 發音/字幕： 粵語/中文字幕
synopsis_en:
In the tranquil sugarcane village of Lingnan, farmwife Chen Fengdi and her husband, Gan Yaozu, eagerly await the arrival of a new life. One day, she and another expectant mother, Lin Shen, go into labor simultaneously at a dilapidated rural clinic. A sudden rainstorm destroys a fence, sweeping two newborn girls into a pond; in the end, only one is rescued. 

From that moment on, Fengdi’s daughter is missing, and her world falls apart. Surrounded by rumors, suspicion, and prejudice, she refuses to accept her fate and embarks on a solitary journey to find her daughter. However, the path to the truth will force her to confront one buried, cruel reality after another...

movie_title: 【嬰兒車電影院】嚕嚕米冬日樂園（國語）
director: 雅庫朗斯基、艾拉卡爾佩蘭
synopsis: 今年的冬天對於嚕嚕米來說很特別，因為他決定不再像往年一樣冬眠，而是決定要好好探索這陌生的雪白世界，這才發現原來冬日跟他想像的很不一樣！許多未曾見過的奇妙生物在雪中漫步，以及似乎有一股未知的力量正籠罩著嚕嚕米谷，一名神秘的訪客即將現身……。充滿好奇心的嚕嚕米努力追查之下，才慢慢認識這名神秘訪客原來就是「聖誕節」！
source_language_note: 語言 國語 字幕 中文
tmdb_overview: 全球國民精靈「嚕嚕米」來了，定格動畫賣萌，探險冬季旅行，《嚕嚕米冬日樂園》，體認聖誕節的意義。今年的冬天對於嚕嚕米來說很特別，因為他決定不再像往年一樣冬眠，而是決定要好好探索這陌生的雪白世界，這才發現原來冬日跟他想像的很不一樣！許多未曾見過的奇妙生物在雪中漫步，以及似乎有一股未知的力量正籠罩著嚕嚕米谷，一名神秘的訪客即將現身……。充滿好奇心的嚕嚕米努力追查之下，才慢慢認識這名神秘訪客原來就是「聖誕節」！
tmdb_overview_en: This winter is extraordinary; Moomintroll decides  to stay awake to explore the winter instead of hibernating as usually. And winters are certainly totally different than he had imagined. Strangest creatures wander amidst the snowdrifts; midwinter darkness surrounds the Moominvalley, and on top of that, an eccentric guest is soon to appear. This guest requires many measures, and is called Christmas, Hemulen tells to a surprised Moomintroll.

movie_title_en: Palimpsest: the Story of a Name
synopsis: 資深剪輯師雪美蓮，總納悶自己到底姓史蒂芬，還是姓雪？明明亞洲臉，又非混血，怎取洋人姓？一查不得了，父親竟來自澳洲！母親曾有文學夢，似還牽涉吳爾芙姪子的中國戀情？她化身偵探親自執導，翻找父親傳記、家庭電影、老照片，以「史蒂芬」為圓心，拼出一幅與世紀風雲、名人交織的私密家族史，追問殖民與身分認同。
source_language_note: 語言 英、國、法語 字幕 中文
tmdb_title: Palimpsest: the Story of a Name
tmdb_title_en: Palimpsest: the Story of a Name
tmdb_overview: 資深剪輯師雪美蓮，總納悶自己到底姓史蒂芬，還是姓雪、姓陳？明明亞洲臉，又非混血，怎取洋人姓？一查不得了，父親竟來自澳洲！母親曾有文學夢，似還牽涉吳爾芙姪子的中國戀情？她化身偵探親自執導，翻找父親傳記、家庭電影、老照片，以「史蒂芬」為圓心，拼出一幅與世紀風雲、名人交織的私密家族史，追問殖民與身分認同。血緣纏如網，個體仍能重寫自我，乘故事翱翔。
tmdb_overview_en: Veteran filmmaker Mary Stephen digs into her own family past to uncover the long-hidden origins of her Western surname, revealing a story of culture shock, colonialism, and contested remembrance.

synopsis: 改編同名自傳小說。1963年，艾絲特生下家中最小的孩子──羅蘭，本該歡天喜地迎接新生命的到來，他卻天生患有足內翻，無法跟正常人一樣站立。儘管周遭的人都勸艾絲特放棄，但她仍對兒子許下承諾，他也可以像其他人一樣行走，擁有精彩的人生。從那刻起，她傾盡一切，只為了讓這個承諾成真。
source_language_note: 發音/字幕： 法語/中、英文字幕
tmdb_original_title: Ma mère, Dieu et Sylvie Vartan
tmdb_overview: 1963年，艾絲特生下家中最小的孩子──羅蘭，本該歡天喜地迎接新生命的到來，他天生卻患有足內翻，無法跟正常人一樣站立。儘管周遭的人都勸艾絲特放棄，但她仍對兒子許下承諾，他也可以像其他人一樣行走，擁有精彩的人生。從那刻起，她傾盡一切，只為了讓這個承諾成真。
tmdb_overview_en: In 1963, Esther gives birth to Roland, the youngest of a large family. Roland is born with a club foot that prevents him from standing. Against everyone's advice, she promises her son that he will walk like the others and that he will have a fabulous life. From then on, Esther will do everything in her power to keep this promise. Through decades of trials and miracles of life, this film is the story of a true, funny and moving story, that of an incredible destiny and the greatest love there is: that of a mother for her child.

movie_title_en: If I Had Legs I'd Kick You
synopsis: 瀕臨崩潰邊緣的職業媽媽琳達是一名心理師，家庭工作兩頭燒的她，面對孩子的神祕疾病、長年缺席的丈夫、難纏瘋狂的個案，還有莫名坍塌破了大洞的公寓天花板，鳥事不斷。她試圖尋求心理諮商自救，卻意外與治療師同事槓上關係緊張。眼看充滿危機的生活就要全面失控，她該如何力挽狂瀾？
source_language_note: 語言 英語 字幕 中文
tmdb_title: If I Had Legs I'd Kick You
tmdb_title_en: If I Had Legs I'd Kick You
tmdb_original_title: If I Had Legs I'd Kick You
tmdb_overview: 瀕臨崩潰邊緣的職業媽媽琳達是一名心理師，家庭工作兩頭燒的她，面對孩子的神祕疾病、長年缺席的丈夫、難纏瘋狂的個案，還有莫名坍塌破了大洞的公寓天花板，鳥事不斷。她試圖尋求心理諮商自救，卻意外與治療師同事槓上關係緊張。眼看充滿危機的生活就要全面失控，她該如何踹爆難關、力挽狂瀾？
tmdb_overview_en: With her life crashing down around her, Linda attempts to navigate her child's mysterious illness, her absent husband, a missing person, and an increasingly hostile relationship with her therapist.

synopsis: 韓國名導李滄東經典之作，全新4K數位修復版首度台灣公開上映 洪宗道出獄後，家人對他十分排斥，而他之所以被判入獄，只是為了頂替哥哥過失殺人的罪名。心冷意涼的他，來到死者的住所拜訪家屬，遇到死者的女兒韓恭洙，卻發現她是一名重度腦性麻痹患者，雖然她面容扭曲、手腳抽搐，但宗道卻被她吸引，並在衝動下做出大膽舉動……。但在意外事件後，兩人卻彼此都萌生了愛情，兩顆孤獨心靈就此漸漸靠攏。他們看似身心不甚健全的非正常人，但卻擁有顆純潔之心，但卻一連串發生遭遇現實不公不義事件。最後，命運是否就此放過戲弄他們的機會呢？
synopsis_en:
A classic masterpiece by renowned Korean director Lee Chang-dong, now premiering in Taiwan for the first time in a brand-new 4K digital restoration. 

Upon his release from prison, Hong Jong-du finds himself rejected by his family; he had only served time to take the blame for his brother’s involuntary manslaughter charge. Dejected and lost, he visits the home of the victim’s family, where he meets the daughter, Han Gong-ju. He discovers she suffers from severe cerebral palsy, and though her face is contorted and her limbs twitch, Jong-du finds himself drawn to her, leading him to commit a bold and impulsive act. 

Yet, following this unexpected encounter, a genuine love blossoms between them as two lonely souls draw closer together. Though society views them as "abnormal" due to their physical and mental conditions, they possess pure hearts that are soon subjected to a series of cruel injustices. In the end, will fate finally stop toying with their lives?

synopsis: 66歲的美子與16歲的孫子相依為命。然而隨著年齡增長，她逐漸察覺記憶開始出現問題，被診斷出早期阿茲海默症。就在此時，一起震驚社區的少女死亡事件，也讓原本平靜的生活蒙上一層陰影。某天，美子在社區文化中心看到一張「詩歌課程」的海報，抱著好奇與期待報名參加。老師鼓勵學生重新觀察世界，從花朵、風景與日常細節中發現詩意。於是，美子開始用不同的眼光凝視身邊的一切。然而，在尋找詩句的過程中，美子也逐漸被迫面對現實與人性的複雜。當記憶逐漸流逝，她試圖在破碎的生活中寫下屬於自己的詩，也重新思考：在這個並不完美的世界裡，人究竟該如何守住善良與尊嚴呢?
tmdb_overview: Crude Poetry is a film about language. It is a film about a deep wish to be understood. Set in the ruins of biblical Babel, a long-lost city which housed speakers of a so called ‘universal language’, two characters come together to make meaning, in this stop motion, live puppetry hybrid.
tmdb_overview_en: Crude Poetry is a film about language. It is a film about a deep wish to be understood. Set in the ruins of biblical Babel, a long-lost city which housed speakers of a so called ‘universal language’, two characters come together to make meaning, in this stop motion, live puppetry hybrid.

synopsis: 與母親分開十年之後，我帶著對父親去世的疑惑，從阿根廷啟程到台灣去見我的母親。我們邊喝啤酒邊抽煙，聽她緩緩道出自己所掌握的少量消息情報，卻沒有太多答案。我的第二趟旅程有了不同的意義，我開始意識到：母親就像東方社會的女人一樣，奮鬥不懈只為了在性別歧視的世界中找到一個屬於自己的位置。
source_language_note: 語言 國、西班牙語 字幕 中文
tmdb_overview: 1970~1990年代，在「白色恐怖」與戒嚴的時代背景下，有一批台灣人選擇離鄉背景到阿根廷打拼生活。作為阿根廷移民第二代的Juan Martín在17歲時，其母親因受不了思鄉之苦，獨自回到了台灣生活。這一別是十年，2012年，第一趟到台灣探訪母親的旅程，他試著了解更多其父親被殺害的真相，但那時母親只給出屈指可數的答案。2019年，已成為電影導演的Juan Martín，再次來到台灣，這次他試著揭開更多謎底，但才發現製作這部片的真正動機沒有其他，而是紀錄那位他拍攝最多的人：母親，一名堅強的鬥士。
tmdb_overview_en: Haunted by the tragic death of his father, Juan Martín Hsu, a young Argentinian filmmaker of Taiwanese origin, returns to Taipei to film the reunion with his mother. Reality and fiction blend in a moving personal quest in which an incredible portrait of a Mother Courage stands out from  the picture of a family saga marked by uprooting.

synopsis: 一種神祕疾病正悄然侵蝕瑞典難民兒童的健康，塞吉和娜塔莉婭帶著兩個年幼的女兒逃離家園，到瑞典尋求庇護，他們努力適應新生活，接受政府的定期審查，只盼有一天能成為正式公民，然而，當庇護申請遭到拒絕，小女兒卡蒂雅突然陷入原因不明的昏迷，面對無情命運，兩人能否在絕望中堅守希望，拯救他們的孩子？
source_language_note: 語言 瑞典、英、俄語 字幕 中文
tmdb_overview: 一種神祕疾病正悄然侵蝕瑞典難民兒童的健康，塞吉和娜塔莉婭帶著兩個年幼的女兒逃離家園，到瑞典尋求庇護，他們努力適應新生活，接受政府的定期審查，只盼有一天能成為正式公民，然而，當庇護申請遭到拒絕，小女兒卡蒂雅突然陷入原因不明的昏迷，面對無情命運，兩人能否在絕望中堅守希望，拯救他們的孩子？
tmdb_overview_en: A refugee family in Sweden faces trauma after their youngest daughter falls into an unexplained coma when denied asylum. Parents struggle to find a cure, resilience tested amid difficult circumstances.

synopsis: 韓國名導李滄東經典之作，全新4K數位修復版首度台灣公開上映 洪宗道出獄後，家人對他十分排斥，而他之所以被判入獄，只是為了頂替哥哥過失殺人的罪名。心冷意涼的他，來到死者的住所拜訪家屬，遇到死者的女兒韓恭洙，卻發現她是一名重度腦性麻痹患者，雖然她面容扭曲、手腳抽搐，但宗道卻被她吸引，並在衝動下做出大膽舉動……。但在意外事件後，兩人卻彼此都萌生了愛情，兩顆孤獨心靈就此漸漸靠攏。他們看似身心不甚健全的非正常人，但卻擁有顆純潔之心，但卻一連串發生遭遇現實不公不義事件。最後，命運是否就此放過戲弄他們的機會呢？
synopsis_en:
A classic masterpiece by renowned Korean director Lee Chang-dong, now premiering in Taiwan for the first time in a brand-new 4K digital restoration. 

Upon his release from prison, Hong Jong-du finds himself rejected by his family; he had only served time to take the blame for his brother’s involuntary manslaughter charge. Dejected and lost, he visits the home of the victim’s family, where he meets the daughter, Han Gong-ju. He discovers she suffers from severe cerebral palsy, and though her face is contorted and her limbs twitch, Jong-du finds himself drawn to her, leading him to commit a bold and impulsive act. 

Yet, following this unexpected encounter, a genuine love blossoms between them as two lonely souls draw closer together. Though society views them as "abnormal" due to their physical and mental conditions, they possess pure hearts that are soon subjected to a series of cruel injustices. In the end, will fate finally stop toying with their lives?

synopsis: 拉卡與懷孕的妻子妮娜在飯店慶祝結婚紀念日，同時慶祝妻子終於實現當律師的夢想，原本幸福的夜晚卻突遭巨變，妮娜被名叫迪卡的男子殺害，拉卡以為在審判中真相終會大白，但很快發現整個審理受到嚴重操控，拉卡無法忍受，他在法庭上挾持眾人，逼迫重新審判，為了查明真相，捍衛屬於妮娜的正義，不惜付出一切代價。
source_language_note: 語言 印尼語 字幕 中文
tmdb_overview: For 25 years, Diddy's rise to stardom and power masked a darker reality. This documentary exposes the voices of those who were silenced-sharing allegations of abuse, manipulation, and career sabotage behind the scenes of his influential empire. It's a revealing look at the cost of fame and control in the music industry.
tmdb_overview_en: For 25 years, Diddy's rise to stardom and power masked a darker reality. This documentary exposes the voices of those who were silenced-sharing allegations of abuse, manipulation, and career sabotage behind the scenes of his influential empire. It's a revealing look at the cost of fame and control in the music industry.

synopsis: 韓國名導李滄東經典之作，全新4K數位修復版首度台灣公開上映 洪宗道出獄後，家人對他十分排斥，而他之所以被判入獄，只是為了頂替哥哥過失殺人的罪名。心冷意涼的他，來到死者的住所拜訪家屬，遇到死者的女兒韓恭洙，卻發現她是一名重度腦性麻痹患者，雖然她面容扭曲、手腳抽搐，但宗道卻被她吸引，並在衝動下做出大膽舉動……。但在意外事件後，兩人卻彼此都萌生了愛情，兩顆孤獨心靈就此漸漸靠攏。他們看似身心不甚健全的非正常人，但卻擁有顆純潔之心，但卻一連串發生遭遇現實不公不義事件。最後，命運是否就此放過戲弄他們的機會呢？
synopsis_en:
A classic masterpiece by renowned Korean director Lee Chang-dong, now premiering in Taiwan for the first time in a brand-new 4K digital restoration. 

Upon his release from prison, Hong Jong-du finds himself rejected by his family; he had only served time to take the blame for his brother’s involuntary manslaughter charge. Dejected and lost, he visits the home of the victim’s family, where he meets the daughter, Han Gong-ju. He discovers she suffers from severe cerebral palsy, and though her face is contorted and her limbs twitch, Jong-du finds himself drawn to her, leading him to commit a bold and impulsive act. 

Yet, following this unexpected encounter, a genuine love blossoms between them as two lonely souls draw closer together. Though society views them as "abnormal" due to their physical and mental conditions, they possess pure hearts that are soon subjected to a series of cruel injustices. In the end, will fate finally stop toying with their lives?

synopsis: 《老鷹想飛》台灣鳥類紀錄片大師梁皆得震撼新作！ 跨越12年、遍歷多地拍攝，「台灣最大猛禽」熊鷹全紀錄！ 台灣的群山深處，熊鷹宛如只存在於傳說與凝望之間的身影。牠是台灣最壯碩、也最夢幻的猛禽，巨大卻難以接近，現身時有如王者降臨，隱身時又悄然無息。對排灣族與魯凱族而言，牠不只是飛翔的生命，更是祖靈的化身。熊鷹的羽毛，亦象徵榮耀與身分，具有世代傳承的文化重量。2003年起，學者孫元勳踏入人跡罕至的山林，展開一場漫長的追尋。他與學生、助理深入險峻地形，在濕滑山區騎行、在崩塌邊緣前行，只為捕捉熊鷹那稍縱即逝的身影。當傳統與保育產生拉扯，孫元勳與工藝師鍾金男攜手，嘗試以仿真羽毛開啟全新可能性。
tmdb_overview: 熊鷹，台灣最珍貴稀有的猛禽之一，2003年估計全台灣大概只有1000隻左右。熊鷹不僅位於食物鏈頂端，是重要的保護傘物種；在排灣族與魯凱族文化中，熊鷹羽毛更具有深刻的文化意涵。2016年導演梁皆得開始拍攝熊鷹相關影片，2025完成本片。
synopsis_en:
A powerful new masterpiece from Liang Chieh-te, the acclaimed director of *Fly, Kite Fly* and master of Taiwanese bird documentaries. Filmed over 12 years across numerous locations, this film is a definitive record of Taiwan’s largest raptor: the Mountain Hawk-Eagle.

Deep within the mountain ranges of Taiwan, the Mountain Hawk-Eagle exists as a figure caught between legend and a fleeting gaze. As the island’s most robust and ethereal bird of prey, it is massive yet elusive—appearing with the majesty of a king and vanishing without a trace. To the Paiwan and Rukai peoples, it is more than just a creature of the sky; it is the incarnation of ancestral spirits. Its feathers symbolize honor and social status, carrying a cultural weight passed down through generations.

Since 2003, scholar Sun Yuan-hsun has ventured into the most remote reaches of the wilderness to begin a long pursuit. Alongside his students and assistants, he has delved into treacherous terrain, navigating slippery mountain paths and trekking along the edges of landslides, all to capture the fleeting silhouette of the Mountain Hawk-Eagle. As the demands of tradition and conservation pull in opposite directions, Sun joins forces with craftsman Chung Chin-nan to explore new possibilities through the creation of realistic artificial feathers.

synopsis: ★ 2026台灣國際紀錄片影展(TIDF) 台灣競賽單元榮耀入選 在威權壓迫下沉默，在歷史遺忘中倖存。她是被歷史噤聲的傳奇歌后──派娜娜 高菊花藝名「派娜娜」，是1950至60年代台灣歌壇上風靡一時的拉丁歌后，也是白色恐怖受難者、鄒族教育家高一生的長女。父親因政治案件被捕並遭槍決後，她放棄原本赴美學醫的夢想，走進歌廳舞台，以歌聲撐起十多位弟妹的生計。在霓虹閃爍的夜總會年代，她的歌聲迷倒無數聽眾，成為政商名流矚目的焦點。然而，在舞台光芒背後，她長年處於情治系統的監控之中。根據解密檔案顯示，她曾被列為「接觸對象」，並被安排與外籍人士往來，在威權體制下捲入政治與外交的權力運作……。
tmdb_overview: 她是高菊花，一位五、六〇年代炙手可熱的拉丁歌后「派娜娜」，也是白色恐怖受難者高一生的女兒。當年父親被槍決後，她放棄赴美學醫，走進歌廳撐起家計，卻長年受情治單位控制與監視。藉由家族訪談與史料挖掘，本片拼湊她在體制與命運雙重擠壓下的生存歷程，這不只是高菊花的故事，也是在威權陰影下，全球無數女性倖存者的縮影。
tmdb_overview_en: Known as ‘Pa Nana’, a celebrated Latin singer in 1950s–60s Taiwan, Kao Chu-hua supported her family through nightclub performances after her father’s execution during the White Terror. Drawing on family testimonies and newly declassified archives, the film reconstructs her life under state surveillance, revealing survival beneath authoritarian rule and enforced silence.

synopsis: ★ 第82屆 威尼斯影展 最高榮譽金獅獎 最珍貴的，是留下一些細小的祕密。 姊弟探望鰥居的父親，在關懷與尷尬之間流露出微妙幽默；母親精心布置了午茶，試圖探問女兒們刻意隱藏的生活近況；雙胞胎在父母驟逝後重聚，透過遺留物件重新拼湊他們未知的過往與身分。 《愛情，不用尋找》、《咖啡與煙》獨行鬼才導演吉姆賈木許以他的冷調幽默、「不發生」的極簡風格，精心構築新作《家庭日》三段形式，映照出當代家庭圖景中的疏離與親密，使日常片刻本身即具有詩與哲學感，也再次證明當代電影仍能在簡約中達到深刻。《家庭日》奪得第82屆威尼斯影展最高榮譽金獅獎，為至今賈木許的導演生涯第一座指標性大獎。
tmdb_overview: 以現代東京為背景，長年在日本打拼的美籍演員菲利普，始終等不到真正的舞台。直到某天，他接到一份「奇特的工作」：加入「日租家庭」服務，受雇去扮演別人的父母、手足、伴侶、摯友——成為別人生命裡短暫卻重要的那個位置。一開始，他只是為了生活接下工作；但隨著一次次走進客戶的日常，他逐漸建立起真摯的情感連結，也在道德與現實的複雜之間，重新理解「家」的意義：有時候，人真正需要的不是完美的關係，而是有人願意靠近、願意留下。
tmdb_overview_en: An American actor in Tokyo struggles to find purpose until he lands an unusual gig: working for a Japanese 'rental family' agency, playing stand-in roles for strangers. As he immerses himself in his clients' worlds, he begins to form genuine bonds that blur the lines between performance and reality.

synopsis: 改編自真人真事，講述塔妮特、瓦萊莉亞和夏拉，三位來自世界不同角落的女性，雖然背景各異，卻同樣面臨著氣候變遷的困境，全球暖化帶來的災難性影響摧毀了她們的家園，生活與希望也岌岌可危，她們被迫踏上逃離故土的旅程，只為求得一線生機。
source_language_note: 語言 西班牙語 字幕 中文
tmdb_overview: 講述塔妮特、瓦萊莉亞和夏拉，三位來自世界不同角落的女性，雖然背景各異，卻同樣面臨著氣候變遷的困境，全球暖化帶來的災難性影響摧毀了她們的家園，生活與希望也岌岌可危，她們被迫踏上逃離故土的旅程，只為求得一線生機。
tmdb_overview_en: Tanit, Valeria and Shaila are three women from very different parts of the world who face the same problem: climate change. They will lose everything because of global warming effects and they will be forced to emigrate to survive.

synopsis: ★2025第六十二屆金馬獎最佳紀錄片、原創電影音樂入圍 ★2026紐約現代美術館 紀錄片雙週影展入選 雙導林君昵、黃邦銓繼《日曜日式散步者》後，再次引領劃時代台灣在地人文紀實美學浪潮。 《甘露水》是臺灣首位現代雕塑家黃土水於1921年創作的大理石裸女像，也是一尊靜默守望的雕像。它靜靜凝視著臺灣近百年來的歷史軌跡，從日治時期到白色恐怖的壓抑與掙扎，這件作品映照出一座島嶼的苦難與蛻變，彷彿以無聲之姿，見證著歷史的風霜與人們的堅韌。
tmdb_overview: 大理石裸女雕像「甘露水」，1921年由黃土水完成，為台灣藝術瑰寶。曾遭潑墨蒙垢，亦曾棄置街頭，沉眠木箱近半世紀，終以國寶之姿甦醒昂首。雙導演赴日踏尋前輩求學足跡，叩訪戰後收藏者台中張家，採集日治的啟蒙微光、戰後的白恐陰影，不僅聚焦作品，更藉其為稜鏡，折射島民時代浮沉。化招牌膠卷攝影為鑿刀，細摹石材紋理手痕，召喚一生懸命創作魂，共臻法喜之境。
tmdb_overview_en: Daughter of Nectar, a gracefully carved marble nude from 1921 by Huang Tu-shui, Taiwan's inaugural modern sculptor, encapsulates a complex century of Taiwanese history, spanning from Japanese colonisation to Chiang Kai-shek's authoritarian rule and the White Terror era. This sculpture, both delicate and resilient, stands as a silent sentinel, mirroring the enduring struggles, suppressed voices, and profound cultural transformations of its homeland.

synopsis: ★ 勇奪「南韓奧斯卡」大鐘獎最佳影片、導演、劇本、女配角、新人等五項大獎 ★ 榮膺第4屆釜山影展開幕影片 ★ 第53屆法國坎城影展「導演雙週」入選影片 在千禧年前夕，金英浩依約到了年少時同伴們的河邊聚會，他們曾在這裡各自訴說夢想，也是金英浩與暗戀已久的初戀情人尹順林擁有最美好回憶的地方。但景物依舊，金英浩卻完全變了一個人，他在過往朋友們眾目睽睽下，站到了鐵軌上尋短，痛苦大喊：「我想回到過去！」。故事以他的死亡開始倒敘展開，五年前、十多年前、二十年前…曾經意氣風發的少年歷經風霜，命運的峰迴路轉讓他成了自己不想成為的人……。
synopsis_en:
Winner of five Grand Bell Awards (the "South Korean Oscars"), including Best Film, Director, Screenplay, Best Supporting Actress, and Best New Actor. Opening film of the 4th Busan International Film Festival and selected for the Directors' Fortnight at the 53rd Cannes Film Festival.

On the eve of the millennium, Kim Yong-ho arrives at a riverside reunion with his childhood friends. This is the spot where they once shared their dreams and where Kim experienced his most beautiful memories with his long-time first love, Yun Sun-im. But while the scenery remains the same, Kim is a changed man. Before the eyes of his old friends, he stands on the train tracks to end his life, screaming in agony: "I want to go back!" The story unfolds in reverse chronology starting from his death—moving back five years, ten years, and twenty years. A once high-spirited youth weathered by time, Kim is led by the cruel twists of fate to become the very person he never wanted to be.

synopsis: 韓國名導李滄東經典之作，全新4K數位修復版首度台灣公開上映 洪宗道出獄後，家人對他十分排斥，而他之所以被判入獄，只是為了頂替哥哥過失殺人的罪名。心冷意涼的他，來到死者的住所拜訪家屬，遇到死者的女兒韓恭洙，卻發現她是一名重度腦性麻痹患者，雖然她面容扭曲、手腳抽搐，但宗道卻被她吸引，並在衝動下做出大膽舉動……。但在意外事件後，兩人卻彼此都萌生了愛情，兩顆孤獨心靈就此漸漸靠攏。他們看似身心不甚健全的非正常人，但卻擁有顆純潔之心，但卻一連串發生遭遇現實不公不義事件。最後，命運是否就此放過戲弄他們的機會呢？

Though society views them as "abnormal" due to their physical and mental conditions, they possess pure hearts that are soon subjected to a series of cruel injustices. In the end, will fate finally stop toying with their lives?

synopsis: ★ 2026台灣國際紀錄片影展(TIDF) 台灣競賽單元榮耀入選 在威權壓迫下沉默，在歷史遺忘中倖存。她是被歷史噤聲的傳奇歌后──派娜娜 高菊花藝名「派娜娜」，是1950至60年代台灣歌壇上風靡一時的拉丁歌后，也是白色恐怖受難者、鄒族教育家高一生的長女。父親因政治案件被捕並遭槍決後，她放棄原本赴美學醫的夢想，走進歌廳舞台，以歌聲撐起十多位弟妹的生計。在霓虹閃爍的夜總會年代，她的歌聲迷倒無數聽眾，成為政商名流矚目的焦點。然而，在舞台光芒背後，她長年處於情治系統的監控之中。根據解密檔案顯示，她曾被列為「接觸對象」，並被安排與外籍人士往來，在威權體制下捲入政治與外交的權力運作……。
tmdb_overview: 她是高菊花，一位五、六〇年代炙手可熱的拉丁歌后「派娜娜」，也是白色恐怖受難者高一生的女兒。當年父親被槍決後，她放棄赴美學醫，走進歌廳撐起家計，卻長年受情治單位控制與監視。藉由家族訪談與史料挖掘，本片拼湊她在體制與命運雙重擠壓下的生存歷程，這不只是高菊花的故事，也是在威權陰影下，全球無數女性倖存者的縮影。
tmdb_overview_en: Known as ‘Pa Nana’, a celebrated Latin singer in 1950s–60s Taiwan, Kao Chu-hua supported her family through nightclub performances after her father’s execution during the White Terror. Drawing on family testimonies and newly declassified archives, the film reconstructs her life under state surveillance, revealing survival beneath authoritarian rule and enforced silence.

synopsis: 《老鷹想飛》台灣鳥類紀錄片大師梁皆得震撼新作！ 跨越12年、遍歷多地拍攝，「台灣最大猛禽」熊鷹全紀錄！ 台灣的群山深處，熊鷹宛如只存在於傳說與凝望之間的身影。牠是台灣最壯碩、也最夢幻的猛禽，巨大卻難以接近，現身時有如王者降臨，隱身時又悄然無息。對排灣族與魯凱族而言，牠不只是飛翔的生命，更是祖靈的化身。熊鷹的羽毛，亦象徵榮耀與身分，具有世代傳承的文化重量。2003年起，學者孫元勳踏入人跡罕至的山林，展開一場漫長的追尋。他與學生、助理深入險峻地形，在濕滑山區騎行、在崩塌邊緣前行，只為捕捉熊鷹那稍縱即逝的身影。當傳統與保育產生拉扯，孫元勳與工藝師鍾金男攜手，嘗試以仿真羽毛開啟全新可能性。
tmdb_overview: 熊鷹，台灣最珍貴稀有的猛禽之一，2003年估計全台灣大概只有1000隻左右。熊鷹不僅位於食物鏈頂端，是重要的保護傘物種；在排灣族與魯凱族文化中，熊鷹羽毛更具有深刻的文化意涵。2016年導演梁皆得開始拍攝熊鷹相關影片，2025完成本片。
synopsis_en:
A powerful new masterpiece from Liang Chieh-te, the acclaimed director of *Fly, Kite Fly* and master of Taiwanese bird documentaries. Filmed over 12 years across numerous locations, this film is a definitive record of Taiwan’s largest raptor: the Mountain Hawk-Eagle.

Deep within the mountain ranges of Taiwan, the Mountain Hawk-Eagle exists as a figure caught between legend and a fleeting gaze. As the island’s most robust and ethereal bird of prey, it is massive yet elusive—appearing with the majesty of a king and vanishing without a trace. To the Paiwan and Rukai peoples, it is more than just a creature of the sky; it is the incarnation of ancestral spirits. Its feathers symbolize honor and social status, carrying a cultural weight passed down through generations.

Since 2003, scholar Sun Yuan-hsun has ventured into the most remote reaches of the wilderness to begin a long pursuit. Alongside his students and assistants, he has delved into treacherous terrain, navigating slippery mountain paths and trekking along the edges of landslides, all to capture the fleeting silhouette of the Mountain Hawk-Eagle. As the demands of tradition and conservation pull in opposite directions, Sun joins forces with craftsman Chung Chin-nan to explore new possibilities through the creation of realistic artificial feathers.

synopsis: "許個願，精靈將為你實現。 浩哲與英蘭在一個小鎮經營自己的咖啡廳，後來兩人墜入愛河並步入禮堂。結婚之後，礙於合約問題，他們無法擴增店面，只能如同往常經營兩間咖啡廳。某天，浩哲與英蘭意外撞到一個流浪在外的男孩阿碩，為了掩蓋車禍事件，他們決定收留男孩一陣子。自從阿碩開始在浩哲的咖啡廳兼職打工後，浩哲咖啡廳的生意無來由地蒸蒸日上，英蘭也慢慢發現阿碩似乎就是咖啡廳成功的原因…"
source_language_note: 語言 韓語 字幕 中文
tmdb_overview: A nostalgic piecing together of a young womans summer night.
tmdb_overview_en: A nostalgic piecing together of a young womans summer night.

movie_title: 夢想巨無霸【國語配音版】
synopsis: 東東是與眾不同的十歲孤兒，經常因身材與外貌遭同學嘲笑與排擠。父母留給他一本滿載神奇故事的故事書，成為他心靈的避風港，也點燃他內心的勇氣與夢想。學校即將舉辦年度才藝表演，東東決定以書中的奇幻故事編排一場舞台劇，希望透過表演贏得大家認同。就在他全心準備時，珍貴的故事書卻被偷走。當舞台燈光亮起，東東能否突破重重困難，展現最真實勇敢的自己？而那本故事書，最終又能否重回他的手中呢？
source_language_note: 發音/字幕： 中文發音/中文字幕
tmdb_overview: 東東是與眾不同的十歲孤兒，常因外貌被排擠。父母留下的故事書成為他的夢想源泉，他決定改編故事參加學校才藝表演。正當他全心準備，故事書卻被偷走。所幸有奶奶與摯友的陪伴，給予他力量與支持，並遇見神秘小精靈，展開一段跨越夢境與現實的旅程。這場冒險帶領東東重新認識自己，也教會他勇敢面對恐懼與孤獨。
tmdb_overview_en: Desperate to prove to his peers that he’s more than a chubby kid that never wins at anything, little Don wishes to win his local talent show by performing a stageplay inspired from a storybook written by his late parents. When unfortunately a bully stole that book, at the same time a little ghost appeared from the spirit world asking for Don’s help to reunite her with her parents’ spirits. The two new friends then embark on an exciting adventure to help each other and learn the true meaning of friendship.

synopsis: 在一個人類早已不再做夢的世界裡，有一個怪物依然整日沉迷於逐漸消散的夢境幻影之中，而孤身迷失在無盡的遐想裡，執著於那些世人再也無法目睹的景象。直到一位擁有看穿幻覺能力的神秘女子出現，她決定潛入怪物的夢境深處，尋找隱藏其中足以翻轉時空記憶的秘密與真相。
source_language_note: 語言 國語 字幕 中文
tmdb_overview: 在一個人類早已不再做夢的世界裡，有一個怪物依然整日沉迷於逐漸消散的夢境幻影之中，而孤身迷失在無盡的遐想裡，執著於那些世人再也無法目睹的景象。直到一位擁有看穿幻覺能力的神祕女子出現，她決定潛入怪物的夢境深處，在夢與現實交融的邊界穿越百年，尋找隱藏其中足以翻轉時空記憶的祕密與真相……
tmdb_overview_en: In a future where humanity has surrendered its ability to dream in exchange for immortality, an outcast finds illusion, nightmarish visions, and beauty in an intoxicating world of his own making.

synopsis: ★ 勇奪「南韓奧斯卡」大鐘獎最佳影片、導演、劇本、女配角、新人等五項大獎 ★ 榮膺第4屆釜山影展開幕影片 ★ 第53屆法國坎城影展「導演雙週」入選影片 在千禧年前夕，金英浩依約到了年少時同伴們的河邊聚會，他們曾在這裡各自訴說夢想，也是金英浩與暗戀已久的初戀情人尹順林擁有最美好回憶的地方。但景物依舊，金英浩卻完全變了一個人，他在過往朋友們眾目睽睽下，站到了鐵軌上尋短，痛苦大喊：「我想回到過去！」。故事以他的死亡開始倒敘展開，五年前、十多年前、二十年前…曾經意氣風發的少年歷經風霜，命運的峰迴路轉讓他成了自己不想成為的人……。
synopsis_en:
Winner of five Grand Bell Awards (the "South Korean Oscars"), including Best Film, Director, Screenplay, Best Supporting Actress, and Best New Actor. Opening film of the 4th Busan International Film Festival and selected for the Directors' Fortnight at the 53rd Cannes Film Festival.

On the eve of the millennium, Kim Yong-ho arrives at a riverside reunion with his childhood friends. This is the spot where they once shared their dreams and where Kim experienced his most beautiful memories with his long-time first love, Yun Sun-im. But while the scenery remains the same, Kim is a changed man. Before the eyes of his old friends, he stands on the train tracks to end his life, screaming in agony: "I want to go back!" The story unfolds in reverse chronology starting from his death—moving back five years, ten years, and twenty years. A once high-spirited youth weathered by time, Kim is led by the cruel twists of fate to become the very person he never wanted to be.

movie_title_en: A Girl out of the Country
synopsis: 阿鳳離鄉十多年未曾返家，原以為可以當歌星賺錢養家，卻因為受人蛇拐賣而在茶室工作。偶然間成為警察的弟弟出現，又在遭拐騙販賣的少女送進茶室時，彷彿看見曾經的自己，決定伸出援手的她，卻陷入更糾結的命運⋯⋯
source_language_note: 發音/字幕： 國語、台語發音/中文字幕
tmdb_title: A Girl Out of the Country
tmdb_title_en: A Girl Out of the Country
tmdb_overview: 阿鳳（高宇蓁 飾）離鄉十多年未曾返家，原以為可以當歌星賺錢養家，卻因為受人蛇拐賣而在茶室工作。偶然間成為警察的弟弟（黃冠智 飾）出現，又在遭拐騙販賣的少女送進茶室時，彷彿看見曾經的自己，決定伸出援手的她，卻陷入更糾結的命運⋯⋯
tmdb_overview_en: Feng runs away from her rural home to pursue singing in Taipei but is trafficked to Japan as a prostitute. Years later, she returns to Taiwan, burdened by guilt and avoiding her family while secretly sending money home. Her brother Ming, now a police officer, searches for her, unaware of the life she now leads. Their paths cross under difficult circumstances, forcing both siblings to confront their past and present.

synopsis: ★2025第六十二屆金馬獎最佳紀錄片、原創電影音樂入圍 ★2026紐約現代美術館 紀錄片雙週影展入選 雙導林君昵、黃邦銓繼《日曜日式散步者》後，再次引領劃時代台灣在地人文紀實美學浪潮。 《甘露水》是臺灣首位現代雕塑家黃土水於1921年創作的大理石裸女像，也是一尊靜默守望的雕像。它靜靜凝視著臺灣近百年來的歷史軌跡，從日治時期到白色恐怖的壓抑與掙扎，這件作品映照出一座島嶼的苦難與蛻變，彷彿以無聲之姿，見證著歷史的風霜與人們的堅韌。
tmdb_overview: 大理石裸女雕像「甘露水」，1921年由黃土水完成，為台灣藝術瑰寶。曾遭潑墨蒙垢，亦曾棄置街頭，沉眠木箱近半世紀，終以國寶之姿甦醒昂首。雙導演赴日踏尋前輩求學足跡，叩訪戰後收藏者台中張家，採集日治的啟蒙微光、戰後的白恐陰影，不僅聚焦作品，更藉其為稜鏡，折射島民時代浮沉。化招牌膠卷攝影為鑿刀，細摹石材紋理手痕，召喚一生懸命創作魂，共臻法喜之境。
tmdb_overview_en: Daughter of Nectar, a gracefully carved marble nude from 1921 by Huang Tu-shui, Taiwan's inaugural modern sculptor, encapsulates a complex century of Taiwanese history, spanning from Japanese colonisation to Chiang Kai-shek's authoritarian rule and the White Terror era. This sculpture, both delicate and resilient, stands as a silent sentinel, mirroring the enduring struggles, suppressed voices, and profound cultural transformations of its homeland.

synopsis: ★ 第82屆 威尼斯影展 最高榮譽金獅獎 最珍貴的，是留下一些細小的祕密。 姊弟探望鰥居的父親，在關懷與尷尬之間流露出微妙幽默；母親精心布置了午茶，試圖探問女兒們刻意隱藏的生活近況；雙胞胎在父母驟逝後重聚，透過遺留物件重新拼湊他們未知的過往與身分。 《愛情，不用尋找》、《咖啡與煙》獨行鬼才導演吉姆賈木許以他的冷調幽默、「不發生」的極簡風格，精心構築新作《家庭日》三段形式，映照出當代家庭圖景中的疏離與親密，使日常片刻本身即具有詩與哲學感，也再次證明當代電影仍能在簡約中達到深刻。《家庭日》奪得第82屆威尼斯影展最高榮譽金獅獎，為至今賈木許的導演生涯第一座指標性大獎。
tmdb_overview: 以現代東京為背景，長年在日本打拼的美籍演員菲利普，始終等不到真正的舞台。直到某天，他接到一份「奇特的工作」：加入「日租家庭」服務，受雇去扮演別人的父母、手足、伴侶、摯友——成為別人生命裡短暫卻重要的那個位置。一開始，他只是為了生活接下工作；但隨著一次次走進客戶的日常，他逐漸建立起真摯的情感連結，也在道德與現實的複雜之間，重新理解「家」的意義：有時候，人真正需要的不是完美的關係，而是有人願意靠近、願意留下。
tmdb_overview_en: An American actor in Tokyo struggles to find purpose until he lands an unusual gig: working for a Japanese 'rental family' agency, playing stand-in roles for strangers. As he immerses himself in his clients' worlds, he begins to form genuine bonds that blur the lines between performance and reality.

synopsis: ★ 2026台灣國際紀錄片影展(TIDF) 台灣競賽單元榮耀入選 在威權壓迫下沉默，在歷史遺忘中倖存。她是被歷史噤聲的傳奇歌后──派娜娜 高菊花藝名「派娜娜」，是1950至60年代台灣歌壇上風靡一時的拉丁歌后，也是白色恐怖受難者、鄒族教育家高一生的長女。父親因政治案件被捕並遭槍決後，她放棄原本赴美學醫的夢想，走進歌廳舞台，以歌聲撐起十多位弟妹的生計。在霓虹閃爍的夜總會年代，她的歌聲迷倒無數聽眾，成為政商名流矚目的焦點。然而，在舞台光芒背後，她長年處於情治系統的監控之中。根據解密檔案顯示，她曾被列為「接觸對象」，並被安排與外籍人士往來，在威權體制下捲入政治與外交的權力運作……。
tmdb_overview: 她是高菊花，一位五、六〇年代炙手可熱的拉丁歌后「派娜娜」，也是白色恐怖受難者高一生的女兒。當年父親被槍決後，她放棄赴美學醫，走進歌廳撐起家計，卻長年受情治單位控制與監視。藉由家族訪談與史料挖掘，本片拼湊她在體制與命運雙重擠壓下的生存歷程，這不只是高菊花的故事，也是在威權陰影下，全球無數女性倖存者的縮影。
tmdb_overview_en: Known as ‘Pa Nana’, a celebrated Latin singer in 1950s–60s Taiwan, Kao Chu-hua supported her family through nightclub performances after her father’s execution during the White Terror. Drawing on family testimonies and newly declassified archives, the film reconstructs her life under state surveillance, revealing survival beneath authoritarian rule and enforced silence.

movie_title: 【嬰兒車電影院】喵狗麻吉團 (國語)
director: 文森巴爾、維普費爾諾伊
synopsis: 一隻帥氣且愛唱歌、有點自大的家貓Moxy意外走失，必須與她最不想理會的「悲劇搭檔」──一隻超搞笑的狗狗和一隻老成的鳥兒，一同踏上爆笑又暖心的冒險旅程。Moxy和9歲主人Joosje是好搭檔，她們不僅日常撒嬌，還一起彈鋼琴。一次假期中，Joosje偷偷帶Moxy到南法農場，農場女主人Rita表面和善，卻狠心又有野心，並關押Moxy於地窖。被困的Moxy靠謊言說服笨拙的拳師犬Tuur幫助她逃脫，三人成為奇妙組合展開逃亡。
source_language_note: 語言 國語 字幕 中文
tmdb_overview: 一隻帥氣且愛唱歌、有點自大的家貓莫希意外走失，必須與她最不想理會的「悲劇搭檔」一隻超搞笑的狗狗和一隻老成的鳥兒，一同踏上爆笑又暖心的冒險旅程！
tmdb_overview_en: From the cobbled streets of Paris to the wild countryside of Europe, follow Miss Moxy — a pampered cat with a whole lot of cattitude — as she’s thrown into the adventure of a lifetime. Lost far from home, she must team up with a goofy dog and a wise old bird to find her way back… and discover who she truly is along the way.

synopsis: 伊娃正與新伴侶納薩里奧及他的女兒艾莉西亞過著幸福的生活。然而，與前夫荷西的重逢後，卻打開了一連串複雜情勢的大門，讓她踏上一段充滿恐懼的旅程，並為所有人帶來可怕的後果。一切都不像表面所見，每個人所見的，都是各自平行的真相。
source_language_note: 發音/字幕： 西班牙語/中文字幕
tmdb_overview: 伊娃正與新伴侶納薩里奧以及他的女兒艾莉西亞過著幸福的生活。然而，與前夫荷西的重逢後，卻打開了一連串複雜情勢的大門，讓她踏上一段充滿恐懼的旅程，並為所有人帶來可怕的後果。一切都不像表面所見，每個人所見的，都是各自平行的真相。
tmdb_overview_en: Eva is in a happy moment of her life with her new partner, Nazario, and his daughter Alicia. But an encounter with her ex, José, opens the door to complicated situations that will send her on a journey of fear that has terrible consequences for everyone. Nothing is what it seems.

synopsis: 落魄的私家偵探歐陽偉業收到委託：旅行社老闆要求他調查自己的女朋友，而她竟是歐陽偉業的妻子關詠心，敵不過內心煎熬，他放棄為另一個客戶尋找失蹤未婚妻，趕往酒店捉姦，沒想到客戶的未婚妻在他離開現場後被殺，原以為普通出軌事件竟變成謀殺案！為阻止兇手殺害下一個目標，歐陽偉業必須力挽狂瀾。
source_language_note: 語言 粵語 字幕 中文
tmdb_overview: 落魄的私家偵探歐陽偉業收到委託：旅行社老闆要求他調查自己的女朋友，而她竟是歐陽偉業的妻子關詠心，敵不過內心煎熬，他放棄為另一個客戶尋找失蹤未婚妻，趕往酒店捉姦，沒想到客戶的未婚妻在他離開現場後被殺，原以為普通出軌事件竟變成謀殺案！為阻止兇手殺害下一個目標，歐陽偉業必須力挽狂瀾。
tmdb_overview_en: Au Yeung Wai Yip is a private detective who has been focusing on missing persons and adultery investigations for many years. One day, he received a "special" commission: the owner of the travel agency had asked him to investigate his girlfriend, who happened to be Au Yeung Wai Yip’s wife.Being a private detective, he is used to looking for the truth with cold eyes for his clients, but he finds it difficult to face the truth about their own marriage. Unable to withstand his inner torment, Au Yeung Wai Yip gave up on another ongoing case - a client's search for his missing fiancée - and went to the hotel to catch the adulterer. Unfortunately, the marriage could not be saved in the end, and the client's fiancée was killed after he left. A seemingly ordinary affair turned into a murderous incident!

Drawing on family testimonies and newly declassified archives, the film reconstructs her life under state surveillance, revealing survival beneath authoritarian rule and enforced silence.

synopsis: ★ 勇奪「南韓奧斯卡」大鐘獎最佳影片、導演、劇本、女配角、新人等五項大獎 ★ 榮膺第4屆釜山影展開幕影片 ★ 第53屆法國坎城影展「導演雙週」入選影片 在千禧年前夕，金英浩依約到了年少時同伴們的河邊聚會，他們曾在這裡各自訴說夢想，也是金英浩與暗戀已久的初戀情人尹順林擁有最美好回憶的地方。但景物依舊，金英浩卻完全變了一個人，他在過往朋友們眾目睽睽下，站到了鐵軌上尋短，痛苦大喊：「我想回到過去！」。故事以他的死亡開始倒敘展開，五年前、十多年前、二十年前…曾經意氣風發的少年歷經風霜，命運的峰迴路轉讓他成了自己不想成為的人……。
synopsis_en:
Winner of five Grand Bell Awards (the "South Korean Oscars"), including Best Film, Director, Screenplay, Best Supporting Actress, and Best New Actor. Opening film of the 4th Busan International Film Festival and selected for the Directors' Fortnight at the 53rd Cannes Film Festival.

On the eve of the millennium, Kim Yong-ho arrives at a riverside reunion with his childhood friends. This is the spot where they once shared their dreams and where Kim experienced his most beautiful memories with his long-time first love, Yun Sun-im. But while the scenery remains the same, Kim is a changed man. Before the eyes of his old friends, he stands on the train tracks to end his life, screaming in agony: "I want to go back!" The story unfolds in reverse chronology starting from his death—moving back five years, ten years, and twenty years. A once high-spirited youth weathered by time, Kim is led by the cruel twists of fate to become the very person he never wanted to be.

synopsis: ★2025第六十二屆金馬獎最佳紀錄片、原創電影音樂入圍 ★2026紐約現代美術館 紀錄片雙週影展入選 雙導林君昵、黃邦銓繼《日曜日式散步者》後，再次引領劃時代台灣在地人文紀實美學浪潮。 《甘露水》是臺灣首位現代雕塑家黃土水於1921年創作的大理石裸女像，也是一尊靜默守望的雕像。它靜靜凝視著臺灣近百年來的歷史軌跡，從日治時期到白色恐怖的壓抑與掙扎，這件作品映照出一座島嶼的苦難與蛻變，彷彿以無聲之姿，見證著歷史的風霜與人們的堅韌。
tmdb_overview: 大理石裸女雕像「甘露水」，1921年由黃土水完成，為台灣藝術瑰寶。曾遭潑墨蒙垢，亦曾棄置街頭，沉眠木箱近半世紀，終以國寶之姿甦醒昂首。雙導演赴日踏尋前輩求學足跡，叩訪戰後收藏者台中張家，採集日治的啟蒙微光、戰後的白恐陰影，不僅聚焦作品，更藉其為稜鏡，折射島民時代浮沉。化招牌膠卷攝影為鑿刀，細摹石材紋理手痕，召喚一生懸命創作魂，共臻法喜之境。
tmdb_overview_en: Daughter of Nectar, a gracefully carved marble nude from 1921 by Huang Tu-shui, Taiwan's inaugural modern sculptor, encapsulates a complex century of Taiwanese history, spanning from Japanese colonisation to Chiang Kai-shek's authoritarian rule and the White Terror era. This sculpture, both delicate and resilient, stands as a silent sentinel, mirroring the enduring struggles, suppressed voices, and profound cultural transformations of its homeland.

synopsis: ★ 第82屆 威尼斯影展 最高榮譽金獅獎 最珍貴的，是留下一些細小的祕密。 姊弟探望鰥居的父親，在關懷與尷尬之間流露出微妙幽默；母親精心布置了午茶，試圖探問女兒們刻意隱藏的生活近況；雙胞胎在父母驟逝後重聚，透過遺留物件重新拼湊他們未知的過往與身分。 《愛情，不用尋找》、《咖啡與煙》獨行鬼才導演吉姆賈木許以他的冷調幽默、「不發生」的極簡風格，精心構築新作《家庭日》三段形式，映照出當代家庭圖景中的疏離與親密，使日常片刻本身即具有詩與哲學感，也再次證明當代電影仍能在簡約中達到深刻。《家庭日》奪得第82屆威尼斯影展最高榮譽金獅獎，為至今賈木許的導演生涯第一座指標性大獎。
tmdb_overview: 以現代東京為背景，長年在日本打拼的美籍演員菲利普，始終等不到真正的舞台。直到某天，他接到一份「奇特的工作」：加入「日租家庭」服務，受雇去扮演別人的父母、手足、伴侶、摯友——成為別人生命裡短暫卻重要的那個位置。一開始，他只是為了生活接下工作；但隨著一次次走進客戶的日常，他逐漸建立起真摯的情感連結，也在道德與現實的複雜之間，重新理解「家」的意義：有時候，人真正需要的不是完美的關係，而是有人願意靠近、願意留下。
tmdb_overview_en: An American actor in Tokyo struggles to find purpose until he lands an unusual gig: working for a Japanese 'rental family' agency, playing stand-in roles for strangers. As he immerses himself in his clients' worlds, he begins to form genuine bonds that blur the lines between performance and reality.

synopsis: 《老鷹想飛》台灣鳥類紀錄片大師梁皆得震撼新作！ 跨越12年、遍歷多地拍攝，「台灣最大猛禽」熊鷹全紀錄！ 台灣的群山深處，熊鷹宛如只存在於傳說與凝望之間的身影。牠是台灣最壯碩、也最夢幻的猛禽，巨大卻難以接近，現身時有如王者降臨，隱身時又悄然無息。對排灣族與魯凱族而言，牠不只是飛翔的生命，更是祖靈的化身。熊鷹的羽毛，亦象徵榮耀與身分，具有世代傳承的文化重量。2003年起，學者孫元勳踏入人跡罕至的山林，展開一場漫長的追尋。他與學生、助理深入險峻地形，在濕滑山區騎行、在崩塌邊緣前行，只為捕捉熊鷹那稍縱即逝的身影。當傳統與保育產生拉扯，孫元勳與工藝師鍾金男攜手，嘗試以仿真羽毛開啟全新可能性。
tmdb_overview: 熊鷹，台灣最珍貴稀有的猛禽之一，2003年估計全台灣大概只有1000隻左右。熊鷹不僅位於食物鏈頂端，是重要的保護傘物種；在排灣族與魯凱族文化中，熊鷹羽毛更具有深刻的文化意涵。2016年導演梁皆得開始拍攝熊鷹相關影片，2025完成本片。
synopsis_en:
A powerful new masterpiece from Liang Chieh-te, the acclaimed director of *Fly, Kite Fly* and master of Taiwanese bird documentaries. Filmed over 12 years across numerous locations, this film is a definitive record of Taiwan’s largest raptor: the Mountain Hawk-Eagle.

Deep within the mountain ranges of Taiwan, the Mountain Hawk-Eagle exists as a figure caught between legend and a fleeting gaze. As the island’s most robust and ethereal bird of prey, it is massive yet elusive—appearing with the majesty of a king and vanishing without a trace. To the Paiwan and Rukai peoples, it is more than just a creature of the sky; it is the incarnation of ancestral spirits. Its feathers symbolize honor and social status, carrying a cultural weight passed down through generations.

Since 2003, scholar Sun Yuan-hsun has ventured into the most remote reaches of the wilderness to begin a long pursuit. Alongside his students and assistants, he has delved into treacherous terrain, navigating slippery mountain paths and trekking along the edges of landslides, all to capture the fleeting silhouette of the Mountain Hawk-Eagle. As the demands of tradition and conservation pull in opposite directions, Sun joins forces with craftsman Chung Chin-nan to explore new possibilities through the creation of realistic artificial feathers.

synopsis: ★2025第六十二屆金馬獎最佳紀錄片、原創電影音樂入圍 ★2026紐約現代美術館 紀錄片雙週影展入選 雙導林君昵、黃邦銓繼《日曜日式散步者》後，再次引領劃時代台灣在地人文紀實美學浪潮。 《甘露水》是臺灣首位現代雕塑家黃土水於1921年創作的大理石裸女像，也是一尊靜默守望的雕像。它靜靜凝視著臺灣近百年來的歷史軌跡，從日治時期到白色恐怖的壓抑與掙扎，這件作品映照出一座島嶼的苦難與蛻變，彷彿以無聲之姿，見證著歷史的風霜與人們的堅韌。

tmdb_overview_en: Known as ‘Pa Nana’, a celebrated Latin singer in 1950s–60s Taiwan, Kao Chu-hua supported her family through nightclub performances after her father’s execution during the White Terror. Drawing on family testimonies and newly declassified archives, the film reconstructs her life under state surveillance, revealing survival beneath authoritarian rule and enforced silence.

synopsis: ★ 勇奪「南韓奧斯卡」大鐘獎最佳影片、導演、劇本、女配角、新人等五項大獎 ★ 榮膺第4屆釜山影展開幕影片 ★ 第53屆法國坎城影展「導演雙週」入選影片 在千禧年前夕，金英浩依約到了年少時同伴們的河邊聚會，他們曾在這裡各自訴說夢想，也是金英浩與暗戀已久的初戀情人尹順林擁有最美好回憶的地方。但景物依舊，金英浩卻完全變了一個人，他在過往朋友們眾目睽睽下，站到了鐵軌上尋短，痛苦大喊：「我想回到過去！」。故事以他的死亡開始倒敘展開，五年前、十多年前、二十年前…曾經意氣風發的少年歷經風霜，命運的峰迴路轉讓他成了自己不想成為的人……。
synopsis_en:
Winner of five Grand Bell Awards (the "South Korean Oscars"), including Best Film, Director, Screenplay, Best Supporting Actress, and Best New Actor. Opening film of the 4th Busan International Film Festival and selected for the Directors' Fortnight at the 53rd Cannes Film Festival.

On the eve of the millennium, Kim Yong-ho arrives at a riverside reunion with his childhood friends. This is the spot where they once shared their dreams and where Kim experienced his most beautiful memories with his long-time first love, Yun Sun-im. But while the scenery remains the same, Kim is a changed man. Before the eyes of his old friends, he stands on the train tracks to end his life, screaming in agony: "I want to go back!" The story unfolds in reverse chronology starting from his death—moving back five years, ten years, and twenty years. A once high-spirited youth weathered by time, Kim is led by the cruel twists of fate to become the very person he never wanted to be.

synopsis: ★ 第82屆 威尼斯影展 最高榮譽金獅獎 最珍貴的，是留下一些細小的祕密。 姊弟探望鰥居的父親，在關懷與尷尬之間流露出微妙幽默；母親精心布置了午茶，試圖探問女兒們刻意隱藏的生活近況；雙胞胎在父母驟逝後重聚，透過遺留物件重新拼湊他們未知的過往與身分。 《愛情，不用尋找》、《咖啡與煙》獨行鬼才導演吉姆賈木許以他的冷調幽默、「不發生」的極簡風格，精心構築新作《家庭日》三段形式，映照出當代家庭圖景中的疏離與親密，使日常片刻本身即具有詩與哲學感，也再次證明當代電影仍能在簡約中達到深刻。《家庭日》奪得第82屆威尼斯影展最高榮譽金獅獎，為至今賈木許的導演生涯第一座指標性大獎。
tmdb_overview: 以現代東京為背景，長年在日本打拼的美籍演員菲利普，始終等不到真正的舞台。直到某天，他接到一份「奇特的工作」：加入「日租家庭」服務，受雇去扮演別人的父母、手足、伴侶、摯友——成為別人生命裡短暫卻重要的那個位置。一開始，他只是為了生活接下工作；但隨著一次次走進客戶的日常，他逐漸建立起真摯的情感連結，也在道德與現實的複雜之間，重新理解「家」的意義：有時候，人真正需要的不是完美的關係，而是有人願意靠近、願意留下。
tmdb_overview_en: An American actor in Tokyo struggles to find purpose until he lands an unusual gig: working for a Japanese 'rental family' agency, playing stand-in roles for strangers. As he immerses himself in his clients' worlds, he begins to form genuine bonds that blur the lines between performance and reality.

synopsis: 韓國名導李滄東經典之作，全新4K數位修復版首度台灣公開上映 洪宗道出獄後，家人對他十分排斥，而他之所以被判入獄，只是為了頂替哥哥過失殺人的罪名。心冷意涼的他，來到死者的住所拜訪家屬，遇到死者的女兒韓恭洙，卻發現她是一名重度腦性麻痹患者，雖然她面容扭曲、手腳抽搐，但宗道卻被她吸引，並在衝動下做出大膽舉動……。但在意外事件後，兩人卻彼此都萌生了愛情，兩顆孤獨心靈就此漸漸靠攏。他們看似身心不甚健全的非正常人，但卻擁有顆純潔之心，但卻一連串發生遭遇現實不公不義事件。最後，命運是否就此放過戲弄他們的機會呢？
synopsis_en:
A classic masterpiece by renowned Korean director Lee Chang-dong, now premiering in Taiwan for the first time in a brand-new 4K digital restoration. 

Upon his release from prison, Hong Jong-du finds himself rejected by his family; he had only served time to take the blame for his brother’s involuntary manslaughter charge. Dejected and lost, he visits the home of the victim’s family, where he meets the daughter, Han Gong-ju. He discovers she suffers from severe cerebral palsy, and though her face is contorted and her limbs twitch, Jong-du finds himself drawn to her, leading him to commit a bold and impulsive act. 

Yet, following this unexpected encounter, a genuine love blossoms between them as two lonely souls draw closer together. Though society views them as "abnormal" due to their physical and mental conditions, they possess pure hearts that are soon subjected to a series of cruel injustices. In the end, will fate finally stop toying with their lives?

synopsis: 《老鷹想飛》台灣鳥類紀錄片大師梁皆得震撼新作！ 跨越12年、遍歷多地拍攝，「台灣最大猛禽」熊鷹全紀錄！ 台灣的群山深處，熊鷹宛如只存在於傳說與凝望之間的身影。牠是台灣最壯碩、也最夢幻的猛禽，巨大卻難以接近，現身時有如王者降臨，隱身時又悄然無息。對排灣族與魯凱族而言，牠不只是飛翔的生命，更是祖靈的化身。熊鷹的羽毛，亦象徵榮耀與身分，具有世代傳承的文化重量。2003年起，學者孫元勳踏入人跡罕至的山林，展開一場漫長的追尋。他與學生、助理深入險峻地形，在濕滑山區騎行、在崩塌邊緣前行，只為捕捉熊鷹那稍縱即逝的身影。當傳統與保育產生拉扯，孫元勳與工藝師鍾金男攜手，嘗試以仿真羽毛開啟全新可能性。
tmdb_overview: 熊鷹，台灣最珍貴稀有的猛禽之一，2003年估計全台灣大概只有1000隻左右。熊鷹不僅位於食物鏈頂端，是重要的保護傘物種；在排灣族與魯凱族文化中，熊鷹羽毛更具有深刻的文化意涵。2016年導演梁皆得開始拍攝熊鷹相關影片，2025完成本片。
synopsis_en:
A powerful new masterpiece from Liang Chieh-te, the acclaimed director of *Fly, Kite Fly* and master of Taiwanese bird documentaries. Filmed over 12 years across numerous locations, this film is a definitive record of Taiwan’s largest raptor: the Mountain Hawk-Eagle.

Deep within the mountain ranges of Taiwan, the Mountain Hawk-Eagle exists as a figure caught between legend and a fleeting gaze. As the island’s most robust and ethereal bird of prey, it is massive yet elusive—appearing with the majesty of a king and vanishing without a trace. To the Paiwan and Rukai peoples, it is more than just a creature of the sky; it is the incarnation of ancestral spirits. Its feathers symbolize honor and social status, carrying a cultural weight passed down through generations.

Since 2003, scholar Sun Yuan-hsun has ventured into the most remote reaches of the wilderness to begin a long pursuit. Alongside his students and assistants, he has delved into treacherous terrain, navigating slippery mountain paths and trekking along the edges of landslides, all to capture the fleeting silhouette of the Mountain Hawk-Eagle. As the demands of tradition and conservation pull in opposite directions, Sun joins forces with craftsman Chung Chin-nan to explore new possibilities through the creation of realistic artificial feathers.

synopsis: ★ 勇奪「南韓奧斯卡」大鐘獎最佳影片、導演、劇本、女配角、新人等五項大獎 ★ 榮膺第4屆釜山影展開幕影片 ★ 第53屆法國坎城影展「導演雙週」入選影片 在千禧年前夕，金英浩依約到了年少時同伴們的河邊聚會，他們曾在這裡各自訴說夢想，也是金英浩與暗戀已久的初戀情人尹順林擁有最美好回憶的地方。但景物依舊，金英浩卻完全變了一個人，他在過往朋友們眾目睽睽下，站到了鐵軌上尋短，痛苦大喊：「我想回到過去！」。故事以他的死亡開始倒敘展開，五年前、十多年前、二十年前…曾經意氣風發的少年歷經風霜，命運的峰迴路轉讓他成了自己不想成為的人……。

Winner of five Grand Bell Awards (the "South Korean Oscars"), including Best Film, Director, Screenplay, Best Supporting Actress, and Best New Actor. Opening film of the 4th Busan International Film Festival and selected for the Directors' Fortnight at the 53rd Cannes Film Festival.

On the eve of the millennium, Kim Yong-ho arrives at a riverside reunion with his childhood friends. This is the spot where they once shared their dreams and where Kim experienced his most beautiful memories with his long-time first love, Yun Sun-im. The story unfolds in reverse chronology starting from his death—moving back five years, ten years, and twenty years. synopsis: ★ 2026台灣國際紀錄片影展(TIDF) 台灣競賽單元榮耀入選 在威權壓迫下沉默，在歷史遺忘中倖存。她是被歷史噤聲的傳奇歌后──派娜娜 高菊花藝名「派娜娜」，是1950至60年代台灣歌壇上風靡一時的拉丁歌后，也是白色恐怖受難者、鄒族教育家高一生的長女。父親因政治案件被捕並遭槍決後，她放棄原本赴美學醫的夢想，走進歌廳舞台，以歌聲撐起十多位弟妹的生計。在霓虹閃爍的夜總會年代，她的歌聲迷倒無數聽眾，成為政商名流矚目的焦點。然而，在舞台光芒背後，她長年處於情治系統的監控之中。根據解密檔案顯示，她曾被列為「接觸對象」，並被安排與外籍人士往來，在威權體制下捲入政治與外交的權力運作……。
tmdb_overview: 她是高菊花，一位五、六〇年代炙手可熱的拉丁歌后「派娜娜」，也是白色恐怖受難者高一生的女兒。當年父親被槍決後，她放棄赴美學醫，走進歌廳撐起家計，卻長年受情治單位控制與監視。藉由家族訪談與史料挖掘，本片拼湊她在體制與命運雙重擠壓下的生存歷程，這不只是高菊花的故事，也是在威權陰影下，全球無數女性倖存者的縮影。
tmdb_overview_en: Known as ‘Pa Nana’, a celebrated Latin singer in 1950s–60s Taiwan, Kao Chu-hua supported her family through nightclub performances after her father’s execution during the White Terror. Drawing on family testimonies and newly declassified archives, the film reconstructs her life under state surveillance, revealing survival beneath authoritarian rule and enforced silence.

synopsis: ★2025第六十二屆金馬獎最佳紀錄片、原創電影音樂入圍 ★2026紐約現代美術館 紀錄片雙週影展入選 雙導林君昵、黃邦銓繼《日曜日式散步者》後，再次引領劃時代台灣在地人文紀實美學浪潮。 《甘露水》是臺灣首位現代雕塑家黃土水於1921年創作的大理石裸女像，也是一尊靜默守望的雕像。它靜靜凝視著臺灣近百年來的歷史軌跡，從日治時期到白色恐怖的壓抑與掙扎，這件作品映照出一座島嶼的苦難與蛻變，彷彿以無聲之姿，見證著歷史的風霜與人們的堅韌。
tmdb_overview: 大理石裸女雕像「甘露水」，1921年由黃土水完成，為台灣藝術瑰寶。曾遭潑墨蒙垢，亦曾棄置街頭，沉眠木箱近半世紀，終以國寶之姿甦醒昂首。雙導演赴日踏尋前輩求學足跡，叩訪戰後收藏者台中張家，採集日治的啟蒙微光、戰後的白恐陰影，不僅聚焦作品，更藉其為稜鏡，折射島民時代浮沉。化招牌膠卷攝影為鑿刀，細摹石材紋理手痕，召喚一生懸命創作魂，共臻法喜之境。
tmdb_overview_en: Daughter of Nectar, a gracefully carved marble nude from 1921 by Huang Tu-shui, Taiwan's inaugural modern sculptor, encapsulates a complex century of Taiwanese history, spanning from Japanese colonisation to Chiang Kai-shek's authoritarian rule and the White Terror era. This sculpture, both delicate and resilient, stands as a silent sentinel, mirroring the enduring struggles, suppressed voices, and profound cultural transformations of its homeland.

synopsis: ★ 第82屆 威尼斯影展 最高榮譽金獅獎 最珍貴的，是留下一些細小的祕密。 姊弟探望鰥居的父親，在關懷與尷尬之間流露出微妙幽默；母親精心布置了午茶，試圖探問女兒們刻意隱藏的生活近況；雙胞胎在父母驟逝後重聚，透過遺留物件重新拼湊他們未知的過往與身分。 《愛情，不用尋找》、《咖啡與煙》獨行鬼才導演吉姆賈木許以他的冷調幽默、「不發生」的極簡風格，精心構築新作《家庭日》三段形式，映照出當代家庭圖景中的疏離與親密，使日常片刻本身即具有詩與哲學感，也再次證明當代電影仍能在簡約中達到深刻。《家庭日》奪得第82屆威尼斯影展最高榮譽金獅獎，為至今賈木許的導演生涯第一座指標性大獎。

Drawing on family testimonies and newly declassified archives, the film reconstructs her life under state surveillance, revealing survival beneath authoritarian rule and enforced silence.

synopsis: 《老鷹想飛》台灣鳥類紀錄片大師梁皆得震撼新作！ 跨越12年、遍歷多地拍攝，「台灣最大猛禽」熊鷹全紀錄！ 台灣的群山深處，熊鷹宛如只存在於傳說與凝望之間的身影。牠是台灣最壯碩、也最夢幻的猛禽，巨大卻難以接近，現身時有如王者降臨，隱身時又悄然無息。對排灣族與魯凱族而言，牠不只是飛翔的生命，更是祖靈的化身。熊鷹的羽毛，亦象徵榮耀與身分，具有世代傳承的文化重量。2003年起，學者孫元勳踏入人跡罕至的山林，展開一場漫長的追尋。他與學生、助理深入險峻地形，在濕滑山區騎行、在崩塌邊緣前行，只為捕捉熊鷹那稍縱即逝的身影。當傳統與保育產生拉扯，孫元勳與工藝師鍾金男攜手，嘗試以仿真羽毛開啟全新可能性。
tmdb_overview: 熊鷹，台灣最珍貴稀有的猛禽之一，2003年估計全台灣大概只有1000隻左右。熊鷹不僅位於食物鏈頂端，是重要的保護傘物種；在排灣族與魯凱族文化中，熊鷹羽毛更具有深刻的文化意涵。2016年導演梁皆得開始拍攝熊鷹相關影片，2025完成本片。
synopsis_en:
A powerful new masterpiece from Liang Chieh-te, the acclaimed director of *Fly, Kite Fly* and master of Taiwanese bird documentaries. Filmed over 12 years across numerous locations, this film is a definitive record of Taiwan’s largest raptor: the Mountain Hawk-Eagle.

Deep within the mountain ranges of Taiwan, the Mountain Hawk-Eagle exists as a figure caught between legend and a fleeting gaze. As the island’s most robust and ethereal bird of prey, it is massive yet elusive—appearing with the majesty of a king and vanishing without a trace. To the Paiwan and Rukai peoples, it is more than just a creature of the sky; it is the incarnation of ancestral spirits. Its feathers symbolize honor and social status, carrying a cultural weight passed down through generations.

Since 2003, scholar Sun Yuan-hsun has ventured into the most remote reaches of the wilderness to begin a long pursuit. Alongside his students and assistants, he has delved into treacherous terrain, navigating slippery mountain paths and trekking along the edges of landslides, all to capture the fleeting silhouette of the Mountain Hawk-Eagle. As the demands of tradition and conservation pull in opposite directions, Sun joins forces with craftsman Chung Chin-nan to explore new possibilities through the creation of realistic artificial feathers.

synopsis: ★ 勇奪「南韓奧斯卡」大鐘獎最佳影片、導演、劇本、女配角、新人等五項大獎 ★ 榮膺第4屆釜山影展開幕影片 ★ 第53屆法國坎城影展「導演雙週」入選影片 在千禧年前夕，金英浩依約到了年少時同伴們的河邊聚會，他們曾在這裡各自訴說夢想，也是金英浩與暗戀已久的初戀情人尹順林擁有最美好回憶的地方。但景物依舊，金英浩卻完全變了一個人，他在過往朋友們眾目睽睽下，站到了鐵軌上尋短，痛苦大喊：「我想回到過去！」。故事以他的死亡開始倒敘展開，五年前、十多年前、二十年前…曾經意氣風發的少年歷經風霜，命運的峰迴路轉讓他成了自己不想成為的人……。
synopsis_en:
Winner of five Grand Bell Awards (the "South Korean Oscars"), including Best Film, Director, Screenplay, Best Supporting Actress, and Best New Actor. Opening film of the 4th Busan International Film Festival and selected for the Directors' Fortnight at the 53rd Cannes Film Festival.

On the eve of the millennium, Kim Yong-ho arrives at a riverside reunion with his childhood friends. This is the spot where they once shared their dreams and where Kim experienced his most beautiful memories with his long-time first love, Yun Sun-im. But while the scenery remains the same, Kim is a changed man. Before the eyes of his old friends, he stands on the train tracks to end his life, screaming in agony: "I want to go back!" The story unfolds in reverse chronology starting from his death—moving back five years, ten years, and twenty years. A once high-spirited youth weathered by time, Kim is led by the cruel twists of fate to become the very person he never wanted to be.

synopsis: 19世紀末丹麥牧師為了在蠻荒異土蓋教堂、拍下異鄉人的照片，而泊旅至遙遠的屬地冰島。他們跋山涉水，大自然的力量漸漸侵蝕牧師的信念與理想。即便在陌生的小鎮傳教，越深入當地生活，伴隨而來的人性和慾望，卻如同暗箱中顛倒的幻象，令他偏離初衷而感到迷惘。眼看寒冬逼近，這趟旅程終將帶他去向何方？
source_language_note: 語言 冰島語 字幕 中文
synopsis_en: In the late 19th century, a Danish priest travels to a remote part of Iceland with the mission of building a church and photographing its people. As he treks across the rugged, unforgiving landscape, the overwhelming forces of nature begin to erode his faith and ideals. Even as he settles into a small community to begin his ministry, the deeper he immerses himself in local life, the more he is confronted by human nature and temptation. Like the inverted images in a camera obscura, these forces distort his sense of purpose, leaving him adrift. With the harsh winter fast approaching, where will this journey ultimately lead him?

synopsis: 韓國名導李滄東經典之作，全新4K數位修復版首度台灣公開上映 洪宗道出獄後，家人對他十分排斥，而他之所以被判入獄，只是為了頂替哥哥過失殺人的罪名。心冷意涼的他，來到死者的住所拜訪家屬，遇到死者的女兒韓恭洙，卻發現她是一名重度腦性麻痹患者，雖然她面容扭曲、手腳抽搐，但宗道卻被她吸引，並在衝動下做出大膽舉動……。但在意外事件後，兩人卻彼此都萌生了愛情，兩顆孤獨心靈就此漸漸靠攏。他們看似身心不甚健全的非正常人，但卻擁有顆純潔之心，但卻一連串發生遭遇現實不公不義事件。最後，命運是否就此放過戲弄他們的機會呢？
synopsis_en:
A classic masterpiece by renowned Korean director Lee Chang-dong, now premiering in Taiwan for the first time in a brand-new 4K digital restoration. 

Upon his release from prison, Hong Jong-du finds himself rejected by his family; he had only served time to take the blame for his brother’s involuntary manslaughter charge. Dejected and lost, he visits the home of the victim’s family, where he meets the daughter, Han Gong-ju. He discovers she suffers from severe cerebral palsy, and though her face is contorted and her limbs twitch, Jong-du finds himself drawn to her, leading him to commit a bold and impulsive act. 

Yet, following this unexpected encounter, a genuine love blossoms between them as two lonely souls draw closer together. Though society views them as "abnormal" due to their physical and mental conditions, they possess pure hearts that are soon subjected to a series of cruel injustices. In the end, will fate finally stop toying with their lives?

synopsis: ★ 2026台灣國際紀錄片影展(TIDF) 台灣競賽單元榮耀入選 在威權壓迫下沉默，在歷史遺忘中倖存。她是被歷史噤聲的傳奇歌后──派娜娜 高菊花藝名「派娜娜」，是1950至60年代台灣歌壇上風靡一時的拉丁歌后，也是白色恐怖受難者、鄒族教育家高一生的長女。父親因政治案件被捕並遭槍決後，她放棄原本赴美學醫的夢想，走進歌廳舞台，以歌聲撐起十多位弟妹的生計。在霓虹閃爍的夜總會年代，她的歌聲迷倒無數聽眾，成為政商名流矚目的焦點。然而，在舞台光芒背後，她長年處於情治系統的監控之中。根據解密檔案顯示，她曾被列為「接觸對象」，並被安排與外籍人士往來，在威權體制下捲入政治與外交的權力運作……。
tmdb_overview: 她是高菊花，一位五、六〇年代炙手可熱的拉丁歌后「派娜娜」，也是白色恐怖受難者高一生的女兒。當年父親被槍決後，她放棄赴美學醫，走進歌廳撐起家計，卻長年受情治單位控制與監視。藉由家族訪談與史料挖掘，本片拼湊她在體制與命運雙重擠壓下的生存歷程，這不只是高菊花的故事，也是在威權陰影下，全球無數女性倖存者的縮影。
tmdb_overview_en: Known as ‘Pa Nana’, a celebrated Latin singer in 1950s–60s Taiwan, Kao Chu-hua supported her family through nightclub performances after her father’s execution during the White Terror. Drawing on family testimonies and newly declassified archives, the film reconstructs her life under state surveillance, revealing survival beneath authoritarian rule and enforced silence.

synopsis: ★ 第82屆 威尼斯影展 最高榮譽金獅獎 最珍貴的，是留下一些細小的祕密。 姊弟探望鰥居的父親，在關懷與尷尬之間流露出微妙幽默；母親精心布置了午茶，試圖探問女兒們刻意隱藏的生活近況；雙胞胎在父母驟逝後重聚，透過遺留物件重新拼湊他們未知的過往與身分。 《愛情，不用尋找》、《咖啡與煙》獨行鬼才導演吉姆賈木許以他的冷調幽默、「不發生」的極簡風格，精心構築新作《家庭日》三段形式，映照出當代家庭圖景中的疏離與親密，使日常片刻本身即具有詩與哲學感，也再次證明當代電影仍能在簡約中達到深刻。《家庭日》奪得第82屆威尼斯影展最高榮譽金獅獎，為至今賈木許的導演生涯第一座指標性大獎。
tmdb_overview: 以現代東京為背景，長年在日本打拼的美籍演員菲利普，始終等不到真正的舞台。直到某天，他接到一份「奇特的工作」：加入「日租家庭」服務，受雇去扮演別人的父母、手足、伴侶、摯友——成為別人生命裡短暫卻重要的那個位置。一開始，他只是為了生活接下工作；但隨著一次次走進客戶的日常，他逐漸建立起真摯的情感連結，也在道德與現實的複雜之間，重新理解「家」的意義：有時候，人真正需要的不是完美的關係，而是有人願意靠近、願意留下。
tmdb_overview_en: An American actor in Tokyo struggles to find purpose until he lands an unusual gig: working for a Japanese 'rental family' agency, playing stand-in roles for strangers. As he immerses himself in his clients' worlds, he begins to form genuine bonds that blur the lines between performance and reality.

synopsis: ★2025第六十二屆金馬獎最佳紀錄片、原創電影音樂入圍 ★2026紐約現代美術館 紀錄片雙週影展入選 雙導林君昵、黃邦銓繼《日曜日式散步者》後，再次引領劃時代台灣在地人文紀實美學浪潮。 《甘露水》是臺灣首位現代雕塑家黃土水於1921年創作的大理石裸女像，也是一尊靜默守望的雕像。它靜靜凝視著臺灣近百年來的歷史軌跡，從日治時期到白色恐怖的壓抑與掙扎，這件作品映照出一座島嶼的苦難與蛻變，彷彿以無聲之姿，見證著歷史的風霜與人們的堅韌。
tmdb_overview: 大理石裸女雕像「甘露水」，1921年由黃土水完成，為台灣藝術瑰寶。曾遭潑墨蒙垢，亦曾棄置街頭，沉眠木箱近半世紀，終以國寶之姿甦醒昂首。雙導演赴日踏尋前輩求學足跡，叩訪戰後收藏者台中張家，採集日治的啟蒙微光、戰後的白恐陰影，不僅聚焦作品，更藉其為稜鏡，折射島民時代浮沉。化招牌膠卷攝影為鑿刀，細摹石材紋理手痕，召喚一生懸命創作魂，共臻法喜之境。
tmdb_overview_en: Daughter of Nectar, a gracefully carved marble nude from 1921 by Huang Tu-shui, Taiwan's inaugural modern sculptor, encapsulates a complex century of Taiwanese history, spanning from Japanese colonisation to Chiang Kai-shek's authoritarian rule and the White Terror era. This sculpture, both delicate and resilient, stands as a silent sentinel, mirroring the enduring struggles, suppressed voices, and profound cultural transformations of its homeland.

Drawing on family testimonies and newly declassified archives, the film reconstructs her life under state surveillance, revealing survival beneath authoritarian rule and enforced silence.

synopsis: ★ 第82屆 威尼斯影展 最高榮譽金獅獎 最珍貴的，是留下一些細小的祕密。 姊弟探望鰥居的父親，在關懷與尷尬之間流露出微妙幽默；母親精心布置了午茶，試圖探問女兒們刻意隱藏的生活近況；雙胞胎在父母驟逝後重聚，透過遺留物件重新拼湊他們未知的過往與身分。 《愛情，不用尋找》、《咖啡與煙》獨行鬼才導演吉姆賈木許以他的冷調幽默、「不發生」的極簡風格，精心構築新作《家庭日》三段形式，映照出當代家庭圖景中的疏離與親密，使日常片刻本身即具有詩與哲學感，也再次證明當代電影仍能在簡約中達到深刻。《家庭日》奪得第82屆威尼斯影展最高榮譽金獅獎，為至今賈木許的導演生涯第一座指標性大獎。
tmdb_overview: 以現代東京為背景，長年在日本打拼的美籍演員菲利普，始終等不到真正的舞台。直到某天，他接到一份「奇特的工作」：加入「日租家庭」服務，受雇去扮演別人的父母、手足、伴侶、摯友——成為別人生命裡短暫卻重要的那個位置。一開始，他只是為了生活接下工作；但隨著一次次走進客戶的日常，他逐漸建立起真摯的情感連結，也在道德與現實的複雜之間，重新理解「家」的意義：有時候，人真正需要的不是完美的關係，而是有人願意靠近、願意留下。
tmdb_overview_en: An American actor in Tokyo struggles to find purpose until he lands an unusual gig: working for a Japanese 'rental family' agency, playing stand-in roles for strangers. As he immerses himself in his clients' worlds, he begins to form genuine bonds that blur the lines between performance and reality.

synopsis: 《老鷹想飛》台灣鳥類紀錄片大師梁皆得震撼新作！ 跨越12年、遍歷多地拍攝，「台灣最大猛禽」熊鷹全紀錄！ 台灣的群山深處，熊鷹宛如只存在於傳說與凝望之間的身影。牠是台灣最壯碩、也最夢幻的猛禽，巨大卻難以接近，現身時有如王者降臨，隱身時又悄然無息。對排灣族與魯凱族而言，牠不只是飛翔的生命，更是祖靈的化身。熊鷹的羽毛，亦象徵榮耀與身分，具有世代傳承的文化重量。2003年起，學者孫元勳踏入人跡罕至的山林，展開一場漫長的追尋。他與學生、助理深入險峻地形，在濕滑山區騎行、在崩塌邊緣前行，只為捕捉熊鷹那稍縱即逝的身影。當傳統與保育產生拉扯，孫元勳與工藝師鍾金男攜手，嘗試以仿真羽毛開啟全新可能性。
tmdb_overview: 熊鷹，台灣最珍貴稀有的猛禽之一，2003年估計全台灣大概只有1000隻左右。熊鷹不僅位於食物鏈頂端，是重要的保護傘物種；在排灣族與魯凱族文化中，熊鷹羽毛更具有深刻的文化意涵。2016年導演梁皆得開始拍攝熊鷹相關影片，2025完成本片。
synopsis_en:
A powerful new masterpiece from Liang Chieh-te, the acclaimed director of *Fly, Kite Fly* and master of Taiwanese bird documentaries. Filmed over 12 years across numerous locations, this film is a definitive record of Taiwan’s largest raptor: the Mountain Hawk-Eagle.

Deep within the mountain ranges of Taiwan, the Mountain Hawk-Eagle exists as a figure caught between legend and a fleeting gaze. As the island’s most robust and ethereal bird of prey, it is massive yet elusive—appearing with the majesty of a king and vanishing without a trace. To the Paiwan and Rukai peoples, it is more than just a creature of the sky; it is the incarnation of ancestral spirits. Its feathers symbolize honor and social status, carrying a cultural weight passed down through generations.

Since 2003, scholar Sun Yuan-hsun has ventured into the most remote reaches of the wilderness to begin a long pursuit. Alongside his students and assistants, he has delved into treacherous terrain, navigating slippery mountain paths and trekking along the edges of landslides, all to capture the fleeting silhouette of the Mountain Hawk-Eagle. As the demands of tradition and conservation pull in opposite directions, Sun joins forces with craftsman Chung Chin-nan to explore new possibilities through the creation of realistic artificial feathers.

synopsis: ★ 勇奪「南韓奧斯卡」大鐘獎最佳影片、導演、劇本、女配角、新人等五項大獎 ★ 榮膺第4屆釜山影展開幕影片 ★ 第53屆法國坎城影展「導演雙週」入選影片 在千禧年前夕，金英浩依約到了年少時同伴們的河邊聚會，他們曾在這裡各自訴說夢想，也是金英浩與暗戀已久的初戀情人尹順林擁有最美好回憶的地方。但景物依舊，金英浩卻完全變了一個人，他在過往朋友們眾目睽睽下，站到了鐵軌上尋短，痛苦大喊：「我想回到過去！」。故事以他的死亡開始倒敘展開，五年前、十多年前、二十年前…曾經意氣風發的少年歷經風霜，命運的峰迴路轉讓他成了自己不想成為的人……。
synopsis_en:
Winner of five Grand Bell Awards (the "South Korean Oscars"), including Best Film, Director, Screenplay, Best Supporting Actress, and Best New Actor. Opening film of the 4th Busan International Film Festival and selected for the Directors' Fortnight at the 53rd Cannes Film Festival.

On the eve of the millennium, Kim Yong-ho arrives at a riverside reunion with his childhood friends. This is the spot where they once shared their dreams and where Kim experienced his most beautiful memories with his long-time first love, Yun Sun-im. But while the scenery remains the same, Kim is a changed man. Before the eyes of his old friends, he stands on the train tracks to end his life, screaming in agony: "I want to go back!" The story unfolds in reverse chronology starting from his death—moving back five years, ten years, and twenty years. A once high-spirited youth weathered by time, Kim is led by the cruel twists of fate to become the very person he never wanted to be.

synopsis: ★ 2026台灣國際紀錄片影展(TIDF) 台灣競賽單元榮耀入選 在威權壓迫下沉默，在歷史遺忘中倖存。她是被歷史噤聲的傳奇歌后──派娜娜 高菊花藝名「派娜娜」，是1950至60年代台灣歌壇上風靡一時的拉丁歌后，也是白色恐怖受難者、鄒族教育家高一生的長女。父親因政治案件被捕並遭槍決後，她放棄原本赴美學醫的夢想，走進歌廳舞台，以歌聲撐起十多位弟妹的生計。在霓虹閃爍的夜總會年代，她的歌聲迷倒無數聽眾，成為政商名流矚目的焦點。然而，在舞台光芒背後，她長年處於情治系統的監控之中。根據解密檔案顯示，她曾被列為「接觸對象」，並被安排與外籍人士往來，在威權體制下捲入政治與外交的權力運作……。
tmdb_overview: 她是高菊花，一位五、六〇年代炙手可熱的拉丁歌后「派娜娜」，也是白色恐怖受難者高一生的女兒。當年父親被槍決後，她放棄赴美學醫，走進歌廳撐起家計，卻長年受情治單位控制與監視。藉由家族訪談與史料挖掘，本片拼湊她在體制與命運雙重擠壓下的生存歷程，這不只是高菊花的故事，也是在威權陰影下，全球無數女性倖存者的縮影。
tmdb_overview_en: Known as ‘Pa Nana’, a celebrated Latin singer in 1950s–60s Taiwan, Kao Chu-hua supported her family through nightclub performances after her father’s execution during the White Terror. Drawing on family testimonies and newly declassified archives, the film reconstructs her life under state surveillance, revealing survival beneath authoritarian rule and enforced silence.

movie_title: 像我這樣的愛情 索
synopsis: 阿妹天生患有腦性麻痺，性格卻異常跳脫樂觀，閒時會約朋友畫畫作樂。可是過度保護的母親堅決安排她進行子宮切除手術，阿妹努力建立的生活再次失去平衡。在朋友推薦下，她找到了一個專為殘疾人士提供性服務的自發組織，並認識了義工Ken。這無私的相遇彷彿撫慰了兩個受傷的靈魂，這樣的關係，是愛嗎？
source_language_note: 語言 粵語 字幕 中文
tmdb_overview: 我們這樣，是愛嗎？阿妹天生患有腦性麻痹，性格卻異常跳脫樂觀，閑時會約朋友踩板吹水，畫畫作樂，二十多年來一直努力不被身體耽誤。可是過度保護的母親堅決安排她進行子宮切除手術，阿妹努力建立的生活再次失去平衡，她的身體永遠是不由自主的。在朋友推薦下，阿妹找到了一個專為殘疾人士提供性服務的自發組織，並認識了義工Ken。這無私的相遇仿佛撫慰了兩個受傷的靈魂，那日漸累積的情愫衝淡了道德與身體的羁絆，這樣的關系，是愛嗎？ 　　譚惠貞繼《以青春的名義》（第14屆開幕電影）後第二部長片作品，將愛情元素和身障者性權益議題融合，成就一個道德探索與自我尋找的故事。
tmdb_overview_en: A young woman living with cerebral palsy discovers newfound independence and self-acceptance through her encounters with a specialized organization that helps people with disabilities explore their sexuality.

tmdb_overview_en: An American actor in Tokyo struggles to find purpose until he lands an unusual gig: working for a Japanese 'rental family' agency, playing stand-in roles for strangers. As he immerses himself in his clients' worlds, he begins to form genuine bonds that blur the lines between performance and reality.

synopsis: ★2025第六十二屆金馬獎最佳紀錄片、原創電影音樂入圍 ★2026紐約現代美術館 紀錄片雙週影展入選 雙導林君昵、黃邦銓繼《日曜日式散步者》後，再次引領劃時代台灣在地人文紀實美學浪潮。 《甘露水》是臺灣首位現代雕塑家黃土水於1921年創作的大理石裸女像，也是一尊靜默守望的雕像。它靜靜凝視著臺灣近百年來的歷史軌跡，從日治時期到白色恐怖的壓抑與掙扎，這件作品映照出一座島嶼的苦難與蛻變，彷彿以無聲之姿，見證著歷史的風霜與人們的堅韌。
tmdb_overview: 大理石裸女雕像「甘露水」，1921年由黃土水完成，為台灣藝術瑰寶。曾遭潑墨蒙垢，亦曾棄置街頭，沉眠木箱近半世紀，終以國寶之姿甦醒昂首。雙導演赴日踏尋前輩求學足跡，叩訪戰後收藏者台中張家，採集日治的啟蒙微光、戰後的白恐陰影，不僅聚焦作品，更藉其為稜鏡，折射島民時代浮沉。化招牌膠卷攝影為鑿刀，細摹石材紋理手痕，召喚一生懸命創作魂，共臻法喜之境。
tmdb_overview_en: Daughter of Nectar, a gracefully carved marble nude from 1921 by Huang Tu-shui, Taiwan's inaugural modern sculptor, encapsulates a complex century of Taiwanese history, spanning from Japanese colonisation to Chiang Kai-shek's authoritarian rule and the White Terror era. This sculpture, both delicate and resilient, stands as a silent sentinel, mirroring the enduring struggles, suppressed voices, and profound cultural transformations of its homeland.

synopsis: 韓國名導李滄東經典之作，全新4K數位修復版首度台灣公開上映 洪宗道出獄後，家人對他十分排斥，而他之所以被判入獄，只是為了頂替哥哥過失殺人的罪名。心冷意涼的他，來到死者的住所拜訪家屬，遇到死者的女兒韓恭洙，卻發現她是一名重度腦性麻痹患者，雖然她面容扭曲、手腳抽搐，但宗道卻被她吸引，並在衝動下做出大膽舉動……。但在意外事件後，兩人卻彼此都萌生了愛情，兩顆孤獨心靈就此漸漸靠攏。他們看似身心不甚健全的非正常人，但卻擁有顆純潔之心，但卻一連串發生遭遇現實不公不義事件。最後，命運是否就此放過戲弄他們的機會呢？
synopsis_en:
A classic masterpiece by renowned Korean director Lee Chang-dong, now premiering in Taiwan for the first time in a brand-new 4K digital restoration. 

Upon his release from prison, Hong Jong-du finds himself rejected by his family; he had only served time to take the blame for his brother’s involuntary manslaughter charge. Dejected and lost, he visits the home of the victim’s family, where he meets the daughter, Han Gong-ju. He discovers she suffers from severe cerebral palsy, and though her face is contorted and her limbs twitch, Jong-du finds himself drawn to her, leading him to commit a bold and impulsive act. 

Yet, following this unexpected encounter, a genuine love blossoms between them as two lonely souls draw closer together. Though society views them as "abnormal" due to their physical and mental conditions, they possess pure hearts that are soon subjected to a series of cruel injustices. In the end, will fate finally stop toying with their lives?
